title: Fallen Petal
description:
Eren Green 29 y/o became the second wife of Jackson Mckane 32 y/o, a multi millionaire of city A. 

After his wife passed away at the age of 28,  because of child birth to their 3rd son, Jackson became cold, and indifferent person towards other people, excepts for his three sons. 

His first son Lyrus is 8 y/o, his second son Jake is 5 y/o, his 3rd son Aiden who is 2 y/o. 

After 2 years of being a widower he never engage in any romantic relationship, but as time passed by he noticed that his kids needed some mother figure in their lives and knowing that, he look for a decent woman to be marry with.  

A woman who can become a model to his kids, give them time and care for his kids, teach his kids and show love for his kids disregarding his own feelings. 

And so Eren became the second wife of Jackson through the arrangements of his family. 

Coming from a humble family, Eren grew up in a positive atmosphere, so Jackson's parents chose her for their son.

 But upon knowing her background Jackson began to despise the idea of marrying such a lowly woman and who knows might be a social climber, as he thought,  but despite his discontentment and disapproval they still got married and now living under the same roof.

title: The Villainess who has Reborn Five Times
description:
The villainess who has reborn five times just wants to rest in peace. 

I am Odette, I was once an heiress who had it all, be it money, status or fiance. When my perfect stepsister appeared, I realized I was just a villain in this story. 
I, being the evil stepsister, was of course killed off halfway through the story. When I opened my eyes again I was reborn, but no matter what I did, I died in the end. 
Having experienced burning on a stake, the guillotine, hanging and stabbing to death, all I wanted now was to die normally after a normal life. Please let me rest in peace!

title: No One Saved Me  ||KookV||
description:
It had been more than a decade since Kim Taehyung, an alpha who became an omega for the man he loved, had been suffering in the quagmire of the world and his partner's indifference and disgust. As he was dragged into the darkness of death, he dialled his partner's number. "I don't regret it." But all he got in response was a hung-up tone.

No one saved him.

***

Jeon Jungkook indifferently hung up the call. Anyway, he would see him soon after that person's gland removal surgery.

He never thought that that would be the last.

title: Holding onto You
description:
When Helena finds a phone on the night train, she decides to text the first number in the list of contacts in order to figure out who it belongs to.
 
                                                                  *****                                                  
 
Helena Santos hasn't had the easiest life. At twenty-one, she's the legal guardian of her teenage sister, in the final year of her nursing degree, and working night shifts at her small-town's local bar. And things get a lot more complicated when she finds a phone on the train home and decides to text the first number in the list of contacts, in hopes of tracking down its owner. 

That contact? Adam Bauer; the charismatic, sweet, and refreshingly honest older brother of the person who lost their phone. As the two continue talking, they can't ignore the chemistry and growing feelings between them, but life is never that simple. To make things work, Helena and Adam need to juggle a troubled sister, a meddlesome ex-boyfriend, and one fat lawsuit - all intent on keeping them apart.

[[word count: 40,000-50,000 words]]

Content and/or Trigger Warning: This story contains swearing, mature themes, and sexual content.

title: How to Kiss a Wizard
description:
"You know what Potter... I think I'll take that offer," Draco began, walking closer towards me, backing me against the wall.

"Wait, really?" I looked at him suspiciously. This was the boy who had hated me ever since I declined his handshake when we were 11... and now he was agreeing to help me. Something was up.

"Yes Potter. Really. You said you'd do anything and anything means everything doesn't it?" I wanted to interrupt him there, I didn't mean everything, I opened my mouth to disagree but he carried on talking, not giving me a chance to answer.


" I can use it to my advantage in the future. Who knows when I'll need it?" A smirk appeared on his lips as he eyed me up and down. I felt naked under his glance as I looked at anywhere except his face. Regret filled me once again.

Maybe this wasn't the best plan, maybe I could back out now, and maybe I could just-

My thoughts went blank as I felt a pair of soft lips collide with mine.

Harry Potter could be considered good at everything.... except kissing. When he finds himself crushing on Ginny, who better to teach him the arts of kissing than the Draco Malfoy?

 What she wanted was a life that two people could never break up.

 But after only two years of marriage, she was diagnosed with terminal cancer. She thought it might be destined to let her end this hopeless marriage.

 She wanted to live, but he suddenly changed his attitude towards her and held her hand tightly and wound not let go....

authorBio:

title: My Quiet Wife
description:
Sufiyaan Baig and Jahanara Noor come from two completely different worlds, but their fates are bound by an unexpected twist-they both agree to a marriage of convenience, uniting for the sake of their children. For Sufiyaan, it's a bitter pill to swallow; he believes Jahanara is nothing more than a gold digger, lured by his wealth and status. He resents the very sight of her, convinced that she has ulterior motives. For Jahanara, the arrangement is no less distasteful; scarred by the men she's known, she's wary and distrustful of all men, including her new husband.

Yet, as they navigate the trials of a forced marriage, bound by their shared love for their children, both Sufiyaan and Jahanara are forced to confront their deepest fears and prejudices. In a story where love is a battle and trust a distant dream, "The Quiet Wife" explores whether two wounded hearts can find healing together-or if the walls they've built will keep them apart forever.

Sufiyaan Baig
28-year-old self-made business tycoon who commands every room he enters. Living in New York to a family with deep roots in Pakistan, he defied expectations by building his own empire from the ground up. Known for his arrogance and aloof demeanor -handsome, powerful, and fiercely independent. He's never been married, but he has a 10-year-old son who is the only softness in his otherwise tough exterior. Sufiyaan believes love makes a person weak, and he's built walls around his heart that no one has ever breached.

Jahanara Noor
18-year-old who embodies grace and quiet strength. Born and raised in Lahore, her life has been a series of hardships. She is an orphan, but her heart remained pure and kind. Gentle, beautiful, and painfully shy, Jahanara has a 2-year-old daughter who is her entire world. Jahanara's strength is in her quiet resilience, the kind that often goes unnoticed-until it becomes impossible to ignore.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio: I write stories filled with passion, suspense, and unforgettable characters. With twists, dark secrets, and deep emotions, my tales explore love in the most unexpected places. When I'm not writing, I'm lost in a book or dreaming up my next adventure. Join me for a journey you won't forget!

title: Trapped For Christmas
description:
Olivia Mikelson has had a crush on her brothers best friend, Logan James, since she was seventeen but one drunken night ruins any chance she had of him seeing her the same way. When he leaves for three years Olivia vows she'll never feel anything for him again, but when he comes back, so does her feelings. 
When the two get trapped in a hotel for Christmas what Olivia thought was ruined may now be within grasp.

Sequel to: Boyfriend for Christmas  (but can be read as a stand-a-lone)

Huge thank you to Marissa on Instagram for the gorgeous cover!

description:

"Please, help me." I pleaded with tears in my eyes as the lycotine bullet kept going deeper into my stomach.

"Huh, you think I'll help an ugly duckling like you? Just look at yourself, you're nothing but trash." He paused. "I, Blade Black, Alpha of the Red Blood Pack, rejects you, Zoey Morrison, as my mate." And with that he left without even looking back once.

title: Hidden in Her Letters
description:
Annie Halden was the exact definition of a wallflower. She lived on the sidelines, didn't like attention and worried too much. 

She wrote letters to herself as her way to get her thoughts out. She never told anyone or let anyone see. 

Leo Smith, one of the school star athletes and most popular boys, found one of her letters. He started breaking into her locker to read the letters every time there was a new one. 

He grew concerned about her and wanted to protect her, he wanted to know why she was so broken and who hurt her, he wanted her to know he was there for her - be her shoulder to lean on. 

How would this friendship work out with Annie being as shy and quiet as she is, never getting close to anyone? How would this friendship last if Annie came to find out the truth about Leo stealing and reading her personal letters?
-
#1 in teen romance

title: Flickering Shadows
description:
Inara Graham lives in the Sun kingdom, where light never fades to dark, and shadows never dare flicker in the sun. Working as a maid in the Grand House isn't exactly what her plan was, but neither was becoming an orphan at the age of 9.

Aziel Marret, ruler of the Moon kingdom, where terror plays like music, and blackness lives through the day. Having just became king, he must find his mate within two weeks, and the festival in the Sun kingdom is the perfect opportunity.

Two kingdoms. Polar opposites. But can love live through differences?

title: A chance to us [Complete]
description:
Ruhaan oberoi and sitara Khanna tied a knot of marriage six months back. A power couple for the outside world. But inside the four wall they are just Stangers. Who only knows eachother's name.

Ruhaan oberoi is CEO of oberio industries. He is known as cold, ruthless and angry businessman but the truth only revolves around his family. There was a time when he used to make everyone laugh with his silly jokes. He used to smile at everyone. But one incident changed cheerful Ruhaan to cold Ruhaan oberio. The incident which removed ruhaan's smile from his life.He lost his love. And the main thing there is no way to comeback of her. He wanted to spend his life with her memories but it changed when his father emotionally forced him to marry a girl of his father's choice.

Sitara Khanna is just like her name. She is star of her father's eye. She lost her mother in car accident when she was 13. Her father is her everything since then.  A father, a mother ,a friend. She trusts her father blindly. And just like this she said yes to marry Ruhaan oberio when her father asked her. She trusts her father. But she never knew that Ruhaan isn't interested in marrying until thier marriage day.

They were living their life without interfering eachother's life. But what will happen when she fell first, will he fall harder? Or she have to go through his ignorance for rest of her life

Glimpse:

["And yes"  he tilted his head towards the girl  " she is really a gold digger" ruhaan said and made sad face 

Both the ladies looked at him confusingly 

"Dil churaya hai inhone hamara" 
(She stole my heart) ruhaan said looking at sitara ]

Ps: English isn't my first language so please ignore any grammar mistakes. 
With love _ Aarohi

title: Colors ✔️
description:
Ace's life is a shade of grey. Depressing, upsetting, painful and what not. Until Venus shows up and paints it colorful... quite literally.

[ #7 in teenfiction 16.10.2020]

For a small town girl who is really shy and quiet, living in a city all by herself, is beyond difficult for Venus. Especially when her inexperience gets her into troubles.

Ace Rivera is the unsolved mystery of his school. No one knows why he is the way he is. What everyone knows is- to stay away from him.

But when the shy girl piques his interest, no one can predict what's about to come.
And, Venus had never thought the mystery boy of her school could be her savior.

One thing is for sure though...
  Ace's grey life is about to become very colorful.

title: Just Roomates
description:
When Melissa was about to drop out of school because she couldn't afford housing without a roommate, Alex was there. When she needed a personal chauffer because her car broke down, Alex was there. When her boyfriend cheated on her and she needed a shoulder to cry on, Alex was there. They have been the best of friends since sophomore year of college. They know each other inside and out, and there's nothing they wouldn't do for each other. But, when Alex has a request, will Mel return the favor? And what will become of them if she does? Can friends with benefits actually work?

title: For The Sake Of
description:
Thera Mallay, she was a self-made billionaire, having chains of restaurants across the globe and many other businesses. Her company was all she had. Her family? No one knew about it, friends? No one knew that either. Where she was from was never known to the public.
Her company was becoming the best, the only competition was from Isaac Grayson, the owner of the Grayson Empire who inherited the company from his father. He was a typical CEO, ruthless, arrogant and cold. He feared nothing but the fact that Mallay Empire might take over his.
So, when Isaac approaches her with a deal to merge their companies by marrying each other, will she risk all she had to be destroyed by him or marry him just for the sake of her company?
---------------------------------------------------
"I will be your wife soon and I do have the right to tell you what's good or not", I said sternly.

He chuckled darkly before turning towards me, "Wife? You will be my wife just on papers, just in the eyes of the public and my parents besides that I don't consider you my wife, Miss Thera Mallay. And don't even think that I am going to obey you, Ever."

title: She Can Be Toxic Too (Completed) √
description:
Just when Aashi was elated at the thought of getting married to Abhinav, he broke her happy bubble by denying her proposal. However, he was later forced to accept the marriage due to his father's emotional demands.

Aashi tried her best to make him open up to her, but was repeatedly pushed away by his hurtful behaviour. She knew that he was shattered because of Nidhi, his first wife and their broken marriage, but was unable to get him out of his shell, despite her repeated attempts.

She didn't give up and eventually made a small dent through his boundaries, only to learn a truth about his past that entirely shook up the human in her.

title: 𝓢𝓱𝓲𝓴𝓪𝓼𝓽𝓪𝓱 𝓓𝓲𝓵✔
description:
Ahmed bhai please! I'm begging you don't marry her. She's no good, she'll destroy you and our family. Please listen to me." Sahaan begs in front of him. 

"What the fuck is wrong with you Sahaan?" She flinches as his loud voice resonates the room. 

"I LOVE HER!" Ahmed seethes.

Sahaan could hear the breaking of the small organ residing in her chest. She looks down teary eyed.

Ahmed harshly grips her forearm and jerks her towards him and cups her jaw tightly, his finger digging in her cheeks making a painful whimper leaving from her mouth.

She closes her eyes tightly resulting in few tears to fall of her cheeks. 

"Listen to me and listen well, this is the last time I'm hearing such words from your disgusting mouth. Next time don't even take my fiancee's name from your dirty mouth." Saying this he pushes her away. 

She stumbles towards the closet, her back hitting the rock-hard closet handle. Pain sears through her back and her wince doesn't go unnoticed by him.

He steps forward in concern but stops remembering her words. A cold look flashes in his beautiful stormy grey eyes.

Sahaan looks at him, her eyes filled with pain and unshed tears!

"You will regret it." Sahaan whispers. 

Hearing the confidence in her tone makes Ahmed stop right before the door, but he doesn't turn back.

"Believe me! I know her more than you. She is my cousin after all. She is cunning and deceitful, mark my words Ahmed! You will regret not listening to me once you know her true nature." Sahaan's voice cracks. Tears are threatening to spill out her eyes. 

~~~

"Sahaan Haashir Khan binte marhoom Hashir Lashari Khan kya aapko aapka nikkah Ahmed Ashar Khan wald Yaqub Lashari Khan se sikkah raaijul waqt me 50,000 rupee meher qubool hai?"

she clenches her dupatta at sides.tears leaving her eyes rapidly she remember Ahmed's words just before nikkah.

Rest of the description and translations to urdu dialogues inside.

title: A Wicked Man's Temptation
description:
Who would've imagined that the Italian mafia princess had a devil waiting for her in the city of Russia?

●▬▬▬▬๑๑▬▬▬▬●

╰┈⫸ 𝑺 𝒀 𝑵 𝑶 𝑷 𝑺 𝑰 𝑺:

𝐑𝐨𝐬𝐚𝐛𝐞𝐥𝐥𝐞 𝐝𝐞 𝐋𝐮𝐜𝐚 is an adventurous girl. As the only daughter of the formidable leader of The Outfit, her every need is fulfilled... until she wished to visit Moscow. There was one strange condition.

Don't fall for a Russian man.

𝐄𝐦𝐢𝐥𝐢𝐚𝐧𝐨 𝐍𝐢𝐤𝐨𝐥𝐚𝐲𝐞𝐯 was known as a wealthy playboy who owned more than a few lavish clubs at Moscow. However, unbeknownst to many, beneath his flashy facade hid a ruthless individual who thrived for bloodshed & vengeance. He was a man who had everything & wanted for nothing. Until he met Rosabelle.

Intrigued by the shy, naive girl who ventured into his club, Emiliano couldn't resist the temptation to get closer. But what started as mere curiosity soon transformed into an obsession to keep Rosabelle by his side.

But there's one problem.

Their families.

Passion blurs the line between love & forbidden desires. And where loyalty is questioned, war can break free at any time.

This time, can Rosabelle save herself from him & his wicked temptations?

မုန္တိုင္းေတြအားလုံးရဲ႕အဆုံးသတ္မွာသက္တန့္တစ္စင္းထြက္ေလ့ရွိတယ္ဆိုရင္ မင္းဟာကိုယ့္ဘဝရဲ႕သက္တန့္ေလးတစ္စင္းပါပဲ ကိုယ္ဟာမင္းလက္နဲ႕ပ်ိဳးတဲ့ေနၾကာတစ္ပြင့္မို႔ ေနမင္းႀကီးအစားမင္းရွိရာအရပ္ပဲမ်က္ႏွာမူပါ့မယ္

The tales which will make you laugh hard and cry at the same time...

authorBio:
DESI TADKA.✨
(Instagram: _.Desi_Tadka._)

We are a group of Desi Authors on our way of being the stars together to
make constellations.

Here you will see everything you crave for reading, with our famous Desi tempering.

Dal me tadka na ho to dal ka maza hi nahi ata, waise hi agar kahani me romance na ho toh kahani ka maza nahi ata.🍛

Everyone wants a Biryani without elaichi...
What if we tell you we can have one?
Our Biryani hot spicy list won't contain a single elaichi.🍽

Living in a desi culture and didn't love gol gappe? Totally impossible!
Well, who won't crave for it?
Our gol gappe short story collection is just a click away.❣

Uffff...don't even talk about shahi tukde!Is your meal even completed, when it is lacking something sweet, that too in a brown household? 🍞
Then how can your reading list be completed without the mixture of Romance and Spiritual just like shahi tukde.🍞

Ahm...ahhmm...(fake coughs ), how can I forget about the most wanted starter?Tandoori Murg!

Can anyone even forget about it? Well...guess what? We don't lack in anything.

just like the taste of Tandoori murg dissolves in your mouth, we have short story books to dissolve happiness in your life.🍗

Round and round, round and round, Jalebi's taste will never stop your taste buds to water.
Well, book series do the same!
Addiction! Is the perfect word for both of them.🍥

title: MY BISCUIT (SHORT STORY)
description:
"Who the hell are you?", the Lion growled.
"K-Kim..Tae-taehyung...", the Lamb replied.

"What are you doing here?", He bit out.
"I wanted to talk to you.....", Taehyung mumbled.
"Talk to me? Really?" His look was a mixture of astonishment & pity.
"Y-yes. If it was late in the evening and you were alone in the office, I knew I could reach you and talk to you in private.", Taehyung confessed.

"So strong a desire to see me? You must need something badly. What is it? Charity? A job?"

"No!" Taehyung's eyes were wide and sincere.

"Speak.", he ordered.

''I am getting engaged next week, and I want you to stop it."

Kim Taehyung lands himself in the cave of Lion with a wish. A wish to stop his engagement. Why? 
Let's join hands in this journey of crazy love.
Let's see if the wish is granted or if he's devoured by the lion. 

Top ! Jeongguk 
Bottom ! Taehyung

description:
Desiree is nothing but a regular female. It's her final year in high school and she couldn't be more excited about that fact. She then gets the idea of getting a prison pen-pal in which she does. So, in the middle of her senior year, Desiree starts writing to Vance Wright, inmate number 7475.

He's serving his last year in Prison so how's it gonna go when he finally gets released and the two get to meet each other face to face? Is he the man she expected him to be? Is she the shordy he expected her to be?


**YALL, THIS IS A SHORT STORY. 
**SOME CHAPTERS MAY BE SHORTER THAN OTHERS.

title: Her Omega Little Dumb [ Rebirth ]
description:
Lu Chan is a top Alpha, with a beautiful appearance and a prominent family background. 

She was already the president of the Lu family at a young age. The only disadvantage is that she hates Omega so much that she always carries an inhibitor with her to prevent Omega from deliberately approaching in estrus. 

Recently, Lu Chan, who was tired of O, got closer and closer to a mute Omega named Mu Jin, and the two even entered the hotel together. 

Omega appears to be in heat. 

Looking at the flushed Omega in her arms, Lu Chan gave up using the inhibitor and gently kissed the red lips she missed for a long time. 

This is her little wife. In her last life, she neglected her duty and failed to protect this person, causing the two to be separated by yin and yang. 

This time, she will definitely protect her little wife and will never be separated again. 

Everyone was waiting for Mu Jin, this dumb Omega, to be abandoned, but they didn't expect that she would suddenly be able to speak, and she was re-differentiated into a rare SS-level Omega. 

-- Lu Chan has been a little troubled recently. Her wife's pheromone is one level higher than her own, and permanent marking has become a big problem. "Qingqing, don't you like my current pheromone?" Mu Jin looked nervous. The scent of SS-level hibiscus filled the room. 

Lu Chan almost lost control, and hugged her with scarlet eyes, "Wife, although it's a little difficult to mark across levels, I'll try my best." Mu Jin blushed and chuckled. Show Alpha her hot glands. If you haven't completed the mark in the previous life, then do it in this life. 

Content label: Childbirth, rebirth, marriage and love Sweet text

title: A Little More than Just Friends
description:
[BoyxBoy - Completed] Jake and Lee are two very close best friends who spend most of their time around each other. Sometimes they like to mess around, have a little fun. But at the end of the day, they're both two straight teenage boys, right? 

Wrong. 

After the smallest kiss of kisses happens between them, Jake and Lee are forced to face their locked box of feelings for each other. And facing feelings is a boys worst nightmare - especially when they're about your male friend. 

Unable to control their obvious lust, Jake and Lee start a secret relationship. But when things get a little too heated for Jake, he begins to do some things that he later regrets. Lee doesn't easily forgive when he gets his heart broken, so can Jake make it up? Or will this be just another relationship that couldn't survive the storm?

(Book Cover by @TheRegularNonsense !!)

title: Shy Boy
description:
There was a boy that likes a girl. He always took notice of her even when she wasn't aware of his presence. With his nerdy appearance and his black-rimmed eyeglasses, he thought it was improbable that he could have a chance with her. He was just a nobody.
  
Always afraid of taking chances, fearing of stumbling in the midst of his words, and his confidence shrinking. Even the thought of her, he has the butterflies growing in his stomach. With just one look at her and he was already in trouble.

All he needed would just be that little push to overcome his shyness and taking a step forward.

title: A Christmas To Remember
description:
Christmas is always the time of year catching up with family, eating yummy food, and having a good time; but not for Millie Baker. Two years ago her mother passed away from cancer and her father is out of the picture. 
Now, Millie finds herself once again alone on the wretched holiday. But she isn't the only one alone on the holiday, her boss, Noah Turner, is too. What happens when two lonely people decide to spend Christmas together? Will they finally learn to re-love Christmas and find love themselves?

title: Enemies by Fate, Lovers by Choice [ MilkLove AU ]
description:
Luna Pattranite and Mira Vosbein were both ambitious and driven with dreams of making a name for themselves in the corporate world. Fate brought them together during their college years where they were fierce competitors in academics and extracurricular activities.

 Their rivalry was legendary, and they were known as the "arch-nemeses" of their graduating class

Years later, Luna and Mira unexpectedly cross paths again when they find themselves working together on a high-stakes project. As they navigate the challenges of their professional collaboration, something changes between them. When their eyes meet, a spark ignites, and they begin to see each other in a new light.

title: The Blessed-Cursed Kitties: Love Bites ⚊  Enhypen
description:
What would you do if you found a box of seven tiny kittens on your way home, abandoned and alone in the cold?

Most people might hesitate, uncertain about the responsibility. But for Nari, who's felt the sting of loneliness and rejection her entire life, the answer was clear: take them in, love them, and ensure they never feel the way she once did.

That's exactly what Nari decided to do.

Little did she know, those seven furballs weren't just ordinary kittens. They were under a magical curse, students from a faraway magic academy who'd botched a spell and found themselves stranded in a new world.

Now, with their fate resting in Nari's hands, their lives-and hers-are about to get a lot more complicated, and a whole lot more magical.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:

title: "Hello?" Pt. 1
description:
Sophie Delaney was just minding her own business seeing in the new year from the peacefulness of her own home. Until one wrong number call changed that. 

Daniel Whitaker is furious. Beyond furious. How dare his girlfriend cheat on him, and with his own brother nonetheless. That bitch. Cue lots of drinking, a drunken call and a huge misunderstanding that would change it all. 

---
Written as telephone calls between Sophie Delaney and Daniel Whitaker.
Sophie is the normal print.
Daniel is the bold print.

---

Aim? 365 days worth of conversations between one woman and one man.
Enjoy the ride.

---

2018 Winner | The Fiction Award | Short Story

title: Stepmom - Scarlett Johansson ✔️
description:
[SHORT STORY | COMPLETED]

{In short: Your dad's new relationship is getting serious which means you have to meet his girlfriend. Little do you know it is the famous Scarlett Johansson. Do you fight it or do you accept her? And what about her daughter Rose? Or the fact that you are moving in together a week after you met her?}

You're Faith Emila Jost, daughter of Colin Jost. Your mom died shortly after giving birth to you, that's one of the reasons your dad named you after your mom. Another reason is that you look exactly like your mom. You have to look really hard to see any resemblance to your dad.

Faith had a pretty normal life. She had friends and small loves. One thing she never had was a mother figure. She also doesn't think she needs one but, boy is she wrong about that. Faith is currently 15 years old. She goes to high school with her 3 best friends and her girlfriend.

Her life turns upside down when she meets her dad's girlfriend. She gains two things she never really wanted; a mom and a sibling. Can she let them in? Or will she stay cold?

Started writing: July 3rd, 2023
First published: September 13th, 2023
Finished: December 27th, 2023

title: TEJRAN FF : TAAQAT - E - ISHQ
description:
He is rude, arrogant but a successful business man of the world. People would fear the name "KK" in the  business world. But where did he went from past 2.5  years, he disappeared like something and nobody have any clue about him. But one day, he returned with a little girl who was sleeping in his arms, she must be around 2 years and what shocked everyone was, he is the father of that little girl.  

Karan Kundrra have a 2 year daughter, the most eligible bachelor was married ? Is this the reason he disappeared suddenly?  Where is his wife? 

More questions but no answer, he always ignore them and one glare, they shut their mouth. 

...................................................................................

She is someone whom everyone loves, she knows only to spread happiness and positive, she despise the word rudeness from her dictionary. She always look for the other person point of view and that's how she is going to tame the rude business man of the world. 

....................................................................................

Saira Kundrra - a ray of hope in his life, his princess and his everything. She is the reason of his existence and he would do anything to protect her and keep her safe.. 

...................................................................................

A tale of this three person, who are going to change their imperfect story to a perfect journey and filled with wave of emotions. 

Join this journey for a beautiful experience..
Tous Droits Réservés

description:
"Hello?"

"Uhm.. Hey?"

"Wait... You don't sound like my mother"

"Unless I was miraculously aged a trillion times and somehow birthed a daughter I never know even if I'm a male, then yeah, I'm not your mother"

"Then who are you?"

"A perfectly capable killer"

☏ ⚊ ☏

In which a girl accidentally called a wrong number thinking it was her mother and earned herself a savage charmer which turns out to be an Idol.

Or in which Ni-ki has no inkling on why a sassy girl keep on calling him just to annoy him endlessly.

description:
She thought going to college that she'll finally escape the nightmare of highschool. But it's proven wrong as her long time bully was there too, a bully she can't deny she have feelings for.

And there's Park Jay who is rich and popular other than being an arrogant one who finds pleasure in bullying the girl he have been secretly wanting for himself.

He thought it was the best way to get her attention.

But as it turns out, she won't be able to endure it until she decides to break his heart as a revenge.

title: The Rules of Appalachia
description:
Hassel used to think that being plucked from his life in the city to live in a cramped, rundown farmhouse in the Appalachian mountains was the worst thing that ever happened to him but when his younger brother, Sloan, goes missing in the wilderness surrounding the property he soon learns that there are worse nightmares to endure.

 Hassel decides that the only way he'll ever be able to move on is if he faces those very same dark, wicked, woods that swallowed his brother up and never let him go. Gathering a couple of trusted friends, he embarks on a hiking trip to set up a memorial for Sloan so that he may finally be free and lay the past to rest. Only, the hiking trip does not go as planned. 

You see, there are a certain set of rules that you should follow when trekking through Appalachia. Rules to keep you safe, to keep you alive, to keep you from being hunted by the unimaginable horrors that stalk through the brush and treetops. Unfortunately for Hassel and his friends, they wind up breaking every rule and realizing why they were established in the first place.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Who am I?

Well, I'm a tired and very broke graduate student with a passion for writing creative fiction and drinking bubble tea...But you can call me Meg Cx

I'm OBSESSED with scary movies, especially slasher flicks, and a lot of my writing reflects that. I love writing fanfiction but I do dabble in writing original stories too.

When I'm not writing, I'm watching horror movies, dreaming of Halloween, or taking my dog on walks through the cemetery we live across from. Ya know, the usual stuff...

I love writing, I love editing stories, and I love entertaining others with the crazy worlds and characters dwelling in my mind. I hope y'all love my stories as much as I loved writing them!

title: I Am Not Ashamed | ✓
description:
"Why do you do that? Why do you dress like that? Why can't you be like any other girl?"  Elijah asked Rachel with curiosity, the girl who was now hugging her books protectively as she looked at her long grey dress she loved so much.

      "What?" Rachel asked, confused. She couldn't understand why Elijah Bornman, the boy who made everyone crave for his attention, was talking to her. 

     "You heard me." He said, his cold blue eyes never leaving her warm chocolate ones. 

      And with a deep breath, Rachel replied, her voice confident: "Because I am not ashamed of the Gospel."

title: Sweetest Thing (gxg)
description:
Making it in the music industry is a once in a lifetime opportunity- one that eighteen year old Yoaly Vega is fortunate enough to be living. Yet for some reason, she can't seem to enjoy a single second of it. 

The saying "money doesn't buy happiness" has more meaning to it than you know. Because if it could, Yoaly would be the happiest girl in the world after her $35,000 signing bonus from her recording label. 

But that same night, after she nearly let those intrusively daunting voices in her head get the better of her, Yoaly ends up meeting the sweetest thing she's ever known...

     The Sweetest Thing

title: It all Started With A Letter (Bella X Jasper)
description:
I stared down at the letter in my hand. There was something so familiar about it. Yet it was different. Mysterious. Alluring. Almost Irresistible.

***

   After Edward leaves Bella in the woods, she is heartbroken. She is in a constant state of intense depression. That is until a letter arrived in the mail. A letter from the person she had least expected.


Jasper x Bella

(I don't know if you've figured it out yet, but Jasper is my favorite. He's adorable and I love him. We're just gonna do our best to ignore the fact that he fought on the Confederate side, and pretend that he has grown from the experience and is no longer racist. Now he supports the BLM movement and is deeply ashamed of his past. Yay! Character growth!)

I have altered some of the characters to fit  the story. Some of their actions in this book would never happen in the actual saga. Our perfect southern gentleman would never hurt Alice, we all know that ;)

Warning: Lots of fluff.

The timeline is a little messed up, but the events are fairly similar to the book New Moon. If this bothers you too much don't read.

I hope you enjoy the book.
Tous Droits Réservés

title: Dimples - [BKDK] | MHA
description:
For years, Katsuki forced himself not to smile, or laugh. All just cause of a small, simple reason.


He didn't like the small dents that formed by the sides in his mouth. 


It's not that he had anything against people who had dimples, he just felt like it didn't suit him. They looked like weird little holes drilled into the two sides of his lips, that just didn't suit his serious looking face. 


Everything about his face had screamed "Don't fuck with me." He didn't want some weird looking holes destroy that, these dimple things were meant for cute people. For girls. (He'd mostly see girls have dimples) Not people like him.


That's what he thought until a certain greenette helped prove it wrong.


He was just that one person who slipped away.


#2 in bkdk - 05/27/2023 & 10/02/2023
#3 in katsuizu - 05/27/2023
#3 in katsudeku - 01/16/2023

title: Hey Idiot! (#2)
description:
The whole cricketing world knew that they both are family friends. But Ella, Nelson and the word 'friend' doesn't fit in the same sentence. They hated each other. Since Childhood.
They grew up together, practised together, fought each other, taunted each other and then finally seperated ways with them becoming the captain of their respective teams.
Forced to face each other once in every year on an annual family dinner, they didn't realise that just another simple family dinner on just another normal day could change a lot.

No one can unite them until destiny decides to take matters into its own hands. Cause when destiny wants to unite two hearts...it won't stop at any cost.
__________________________________________________

This time, he again took a step forward and when I decided to move back, my back hit the wall and he caged me in between his arms.

"Kiss me."

"Wha-what?!"

"Kiss me Ella."

"Why on earth would I ever kiss you?!"

"Cause I can't get you out of my fucking mind!"
___________________________________________________

The detailed description is inside.




(In case you are wondering why the hell there's a hashtag next to the title, numbering it...go read my bio.)
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Hello and welcome to my account, my name's Ahlam, a hopeless romantic! I am a firm believer in dreams, no matter how unrealistic because like I always say, what's wrong with dreaming?

(If you are an old reader and wondering what happened to my old bio, then yes, I changed it cause well, it was kinda childish (and cringe). I gotta sound like I am twenty now.)

If you are new to my profile then please don't scroll back to my old books, they are cringe, even though they were the ones that gradually got me recognition but whatever. My personal recommendation would be to check out the Ludovica and the Alderidge series, each book in that is a standalone.

If I had to recommend one book, it would be Hidden Flames, my latest book. It's just 🤌🏼🔥❤️

Also, I gotta add this quote from my previous bio:
"A love story without romance is like pizza without cheese, and I hate pizza without cheese." (Fifteen-year-old me found this very funny.)

So, that's it!

~Ahlam <3

title: Untouched Draco x reader
description:
Y/n is back for her last year at Hogwarts. She mostly keeps to the shadows. No one really knows her, nun the less her name, so how does Draco Malfoy of all people know it?

Y/n belongs to the Ravenclaw house, atleast she used to. What happens when  y/n switches houses out of something she has cept hidden for years? And what will y/n do when the house she's switched to is in a place where Draco can't seem to keep his grasp away from y/n. 

On top of these sudden and new appearances from Draco, there's a dance coming up and every boy in school starts asking y/n out. Why? Who will she end up going with if she decides to go? Will it be Draco? 

No of course not. Never. Not in a million years. Seriously no.

I try to update this story daily. It's already finished on paper, it just has to be rewritten on this platform so rest assured you will have a finished story. 

Important notice! I do not own the cover photo nor the characters in it, however the events taking place and story line is entirely from my imagination. 
I hope you enjoy it!
Tous Droits Réservés

title: Flames Of Fate (Zuko X Reader)
description:
There is an old folklore about the Children of the Forest. They were mortal spirits who were the First Benders with the ability to travel freely to the spirit world and to the human realm. Each with their own element of air, water, earth and fire. They were one with their elemental animals and travelled the spirit and human realm freely.

Fire Lord Azulon was one of the very few humans aware that this folklore was more than a mere legend, although slightly altered, but factual. He sought out dragons and in one of his searches he found a Child of the Forest with a Fire Element by sheer unfortunate luck and after defeating her, he imprisoned her.

(Y/N) was seen as the key object of victory within the Fire Nation and a driving force of power to their legacy and supremacy but to Zuko she was not a weapon of mass destruction or a spirit creature; she was so much more.

As the Sozins Comet approaches and the Avatar Aang prepares to face Firelord Ozai with the help of his friends, it's clear that Zuko and (Y/N)'s paths are more far apart than they know. 

(Y/N) has to decide; stay in the human world with him and risk it all or return home to the spirit world where she belongs.


♥╣[-_-]╠♥ACTIVE UPDATES TWICE A WEEK♥╣[-_-]╠♥

title: Love Departing From Plateform 1
description:
Life is a journey of moments, and sometimes, all it takes is one chance encounter to alter its course. For Aakriti and Yash, that moment arrived on Platform 1, where their lives intertwined like the tracks ahead. As the train wheels clickety-clacked along the tracks, two hearts beat faster, drawn to each other by an inexplicable force.

Join me on the enchanting tale of Aakriti, a medical student, and Yash, an engineering student, a reminder that love can be found in the most ordinary of moments.

Let's get lost in love together ❤️

authorBio:
Heyyy! I'm Harshita, and I've been on this planet for 18 trips around the sun.

title: Riddle's Rose || Tom Riddle {#Wattys 2017}
description:
It's a Tom Riddle fanfic obvi...

•SHITTY DESCRIPTION ACTIVATED•

Tom Marvolo Riddle has no heart. 

At least, that is how it seems. 

And he is completely fine with that. 

He has no one to love and no one to love him in return....that is, until he meets her. 

Cassiopeia Ara Black is pure-blood royalty, but you can hardly tell because of her constant happiness. Her jokes are cheesy, her pranks are marvellous, both of which are unlikely of a woman of her stature. Being the purest of the pure is hard work, especially if your mum is obsessed with you being married off to a man you barely know. 

When these two worlds collide through unexpected work on Tom's side, things get confusing, weird, and....just...yeah, I give up.

title: Last Duty
description:
Eden Martinez. 

Much more than your ordinary eighteen year old girl. 

At the end of her sophomore year she dropped out of college to join the army, and it was the best decision of her life.

Yes it meant that she had to mature quickly, yes that meant that she has seen things you can never forget. But she's made incredible memories and bonds you can only dream of. 

After an accident in Afghanistan, leaving her with mental and physical injuries she's been put on medical leave for a year. 

Eden had to travel all the way back home to Colorado, leaving her section and her friends. Her new family she's created whilst they go on more tours without her. 

All Eden wants is to get back out there but there is nothing she can do... except go back to finish her school experience. 

Senior year, here Eden Martinez comes.

But she's bringing much more than your typical high school problems.

title: Twin Brother' Love ☑️
description:
Book 1 of "Twin Brother' Series"
{Kaino Parker story}

Parker Perry, a 27 year old working guy with a boyfriend of 5 years, lives a happy life. He's soon going to get married with his boyfriend, Zayn and start a brand new chapter in his life. But everything crumbles down when his soon to be husband met with an accident just one day before their marriage. Lying on the death bed, Zayn asks Kaino Wright, his twin brother to marry Parker and that it's his last wish. 

Kaino and Parker agree to his request and get married to each other. 

Will Parker be able to forget his love and accept Zayn's brother? Or will it take him the time of the world? Will he able to love Kaino? 

How would Kaino feel to suddenly get involved in unexpected relationship and what would he do to help Parker to get away from his self-made hollow world?

How is Kushi would be able to save her married life when her husband's Ex & her Son would live with them?

Can she surpass the hurdles throughout?
A married couple - Arnav & Kushi, who are so much in love with each but there is no communication between them. At this point, when Ex-Girlfriend of Arnav will come & live with them with her so who is Xerox copy of Arnav's character,  Aarav, the distance between them will tend to increase as there is no communication between them.
The family & her husband unintentionally ignore her.
Throughout this hurdle, Kushi has to face her past in the form of her family members itself.
Can she be able to Surpass the hurdles?
She started a plan to make her husband & her family realise their mistakes.

Can they both i.e., Arnav Singh Raizada, a businessman & Kushi Kumari Gupta Singh Raizada, a 12th passed out can trust each other?
Can they communicate with each other?
Can they surpass the hurdles?
Can Arnav stand beside his wife?
Will they have a happily ever after?

title: In Our Next Life | Levi
description:
As a Captain of the scout regiment, relationships were nothing more than nuisance to him. Levi did everything to keep her away. He was cold, distant, and some would say cruel, but that led him to have the greatest regret in his life. Levi lost her in the midst of the war, and it tormented him as he lived.

After a strange occurrence on their way back to the island, the remaining members of the scouts were brought to a different world. One where Levi has once again caught a glimpse of the greatest love of his life. Only this time, everything was different.

"You are a prostitute?"

"No, I am daughter of a prostitute."

"It means the same."

"I said I am daughter of a prostitute, not a prostitute."

"Then what are you doing here, in this room, in front of myself, as a girl who is supposed to spend a night with me on my bed?"

She wanted to answer, but she didn't know it herself.

What was she doing there if she didn't want it.

title: CAN I ESCAPE?
description:
"I want a divorce. I don't want to live here. I know everything now", she said with pain and anger.
His eyes turned red and he clenched his fists. He approached her and hugged her softly. Placing a kiss on her forehead, he said,
"My sweet princess, try as much as you can, but I'll never let you leave me. You will have to leave over my dead body", as his eyes darkened.

title: Lessons in Loathing- A WLW Wicked Fanfiction
description:
"They were destined to clash. Falling in love wasn't part of the plan."
Glinda: perfect hair, perfect smile, perfectly infuriating.
Elphaba: sharp tongue, sharper wit, and a whole lot of green.

At Shiz University, Glinda's charmed existence grates against Elphaba's relentless pursuit of justice. Sparks fly, tempers flare, and insults are exchanged in a rivalry that could light up all of Oz. But when a fateful project forces them together, the unthinkable happens: cracks form in their defenses, and the walls they've built come crumbling down.

But with Madame Morrible watching and the Wizard's plans lurking in the shadows, loving each other might just come at a cost.

Enemies-to-lovers? Check. Magic, mayhem, and a romance that could rewrite Oz? Absolutely.

title: Unexpected Love
description:
Oscar Diaz x Reader

You live in Freeridge and have a boyfriend. Someday you meet someone, who is called Spooky on the streets. You don't like this guy at first, but after a few adventures he's not such an asshole as you thought. Things might change?


❁✰❀✰❁✰❀✰❁

I went to a cabinet full of drinks and took out a bottle of vodka. I put it on the table in front of me, took a glass and poured some of the liquid into it.

"Isn't that a little too much for you?" said a man. I looked up from my glass, annoyed, and looked into the face of Cesar's brother.

A laugh bubbled out of me, "Who are you? My dad?"

One corner of his mouth pulled up, which was followed by a low chuckle, "I can be anyone you want me to be, hermosa."

title: Get You
description:
Mila James is a 26 year old beauty shop owner who is so focused on growing her business. While she is gaining more notoriety for her work through word of mouth and social media, she is also lacking in the romance department. She is genuinely happy just lonely, seeing as almost everyone around her is in a relationship.  While having a night out with her girls, all of their men showed up to crash the party bringing along their brother, Kareem. 
When Kareem hears that his brothers are going to crash their woman's party, he knows this is his chance to get his woman once and for all. They had a brief romance two years ago that ended because she wasn't ready for him, but this time he isn't taking no for an answer. He's 29 and is ready to settle down with the woman of his dreams, Mila

title: လယ္သမား၏ အလိုလိုက္ခံရေသာ ဇနီးေလး
description:
လယ္သမား၏ အလိုလိုက္အႀကိဳက္ေဆာင္ျခင္းခံရေသာ ဇနီးေလး
(ေကာက္ပဲသီးႏွံမ်ား စိုက္ပ်ိဳး၍  မုန႔္လုံးေလးအား  ျပဳစုပ်ိဳးေထာင္ျခင္း)

သူမမ်က္လုံးေတြကို ဖြင့္လိုက္တဲ့အခါမွာ   သူမဟာ  ႐ြာထဲမွာ အ႐ုပ္ဆိုး
အက်ဥ္းတန္ေသာ အမ်ိဳးသမီးလို႔ လူသိမ်ား ေၾကာင္းသိလိုက္ရသည္။ဒါ့အျပင္  သူမေရွ႕မွာ ႏူးညံၿပီး  ခ်စ္စဖြယ္ေကာင္းေသာ မုန႔္လုံးေလး ႏွင့္  အမဲလိုက္ မုဆိုး ခင္ပြန္းကို  အဆင္သင့္  ရလိုက္သည္။

လင္းေရွာင္ယဲ့ဟာ  ဖိအားမ်ားစြာ  ခံစားရၿပီးတဲ့ေနာက္ ေငြအပ္ တစ္ေခ်ာင္းကို  လက္မွာ ကိုင္ၿပီး  နာမက်န္း သူမ်ားအား စတင္ ကုသကာ    ေငြအမ်ားအျပား ရွာေဖြျခင္း၊ သူမရဲ႕ေယာက္က်ားအား  အၾကင္နာ ေပးျခင္း၊ ငါးစားႏူမ်ားအား   ပညာေပးျခင္း၊မုန႔္လုံးေလးအား  ျပဳစုပ်ိဳးေထာင္ျခင္း၊ ေကာက္ပဲသီးႏွံမ်ားကို  စိုက္ပ်ိဳးျခင္း မ်ားျပဳလုပ္ၿပီး  ေကာင္းမြန္ သာယာေသာ ဘဝကို  ကုန္ဆုံးေနခဲ့သည

title: The Choice Of Fate || The Promised Neverland
description:
"This child does not fear death, nor even the thought of it. She sees beauty, the good in the evil before her. She does not see us as a threat; I don't think she ever did. She does not fear evil. She deserves life. She deserves freedom, Isabella. Let her remain with the heathens. Actually, if I could, I would much rather keep her with me. But I'm sure my sister wouldn't want that. However...

"Her death will not fall in our empire's hands. She is safe. I will make sure of it."

82194: Sistine

Sistine found out the secret of the House at a very young age, but she never did anything against it. Yes, she sees evil in the act of killing, but she holds no anger towards those who commit the act.

That's what caused her to obtain freedom, and to become Isabella's spy.

However, one day, she sees her friends resisting, struggling to escape the House. She knows that they will bring her too, because Emma, one of the eldest children, plans to escape with everyone. Because of this, she begins to question what the best course of action is.

Will Sistine report everything to Isabella and corner her siblings? Will she help Emma and manipulate her mother? Will she let her siblings escape their fate and leave their so-called home?

Just what exactly will she do?


("This is just a little something to ease my mind" -TrebleRZN)

Started: July 24, 2019
Completed: June 18, 2020

Cover by: Tenshi_Shinzo (I love this person pls follow ;w;)

Yakusoku no Neverland is not mine in any form. Credits are going to Kaiu Shirai and Posuka Demizu.

WARNING: This book will be following the manga. Read at your own risk. All spoilers to the manga (that aren't mentioned yet in the story) will be deleted for the sake of the non-manga readers.

authorBio:
Hello! Welcome to my account, where you can explore fanfictions, original stories, poems, and a lot more. Allow me to guide you into the world of someone I consider to be a complete lunatic: Me.

I am a Christian and, currently, an inexperienced, amateur writer in Wattpad. Not many people have seen my work (the originals, at least), but I can assure you that it is one of my greatest treasures.

I don't exactly have much to say about the things I like to write, especially because I can barely identify what genre my stories even are. However, romance stories forge in my mind the most out of all of them. I guess I'm just waiting for my Prince Charming.

The reason why I write, even if nobody reads it? Well...

...I really want to show you the fantasy world my God has given me. I want to show you how much He has done for me for all these years.

I want to show you how much hope He has in store for you. I want you to know that you're here for a reason. Whether you have a big or small purpose right now, you matter to Him. And that means you matter to me as well.

I may not be an expert now, but I promise that I will try my best to show you how much He loves you. He's always there. You just need to reach out to Him.

-TrebleRZN 💜💙💜

title: Being loved by a Millionaire
description:
(In the process of being heavily edited! Chp 1-6 finished)

His eyes sparkle wickedly, as he smirks down at me. "You obviously don't know who I am do you?"

He really expects me to know who he is? 

I burst out laughing and roll my eyes, "Obviously you aren't important enough for me to know."

His face is now dangerously close to mine and for a second I swear he is going to kiss me. Instead, his lips brush my ear, sending shock waves throughout my whole body. I don't think I can push him away even if I tried. 

His voice is low and husky in my ear, "My name is Marcus Declan, and I am powerful enough to buy you and every last thing you own."

title: A f s a a n a
description:
This is a tale about A Women who never experienced love before, happens to fall hopelessly for a stranger in her daily bus commute. Now Her daily life spices up with A flavour  of Love..

And therefore The Afsaana began.....


- Humein umeed nehi thi apse phir kabhi mulaqaat hogi !!
Haseena's eyes brimmed watery.

" Main samandar ki lehron ki tarah hoon kitna bhi dur jau wapas kinare par Laut hi aati hoon." 
With a assured voice Karishma eyed her.


 A salty chuckle escape haseena's mouth,
- Ye kuchh jyada filmy nehi ho gya ? 


" Haan, toh tum koi filmy heroine se kam thodi ho !! " The feathery flirt felt magical and haseena wanted nothing but hug this women right now.

With a trembling voice she initiate, 

-  kya , kya aap humein ek baar gaale Laga Sakti hain ? 

As she wanted to believe all this happening is real.

And here her so-called Stranger stepped forward and Without a word, she gently pulled her into her embrace. Haseena's eyes widened with disbelief, she felt the tightness in her chest loosen as her head rested against Karishma's shoulder her cheeks heated up with flush,  she pinched her fingers against her cheeks- IS IT FOR REAL , she thought before surrendering her body into her very own nonnative's embrace who didn't felt a stranger anymore .



Join Haseena Mallick and Karishma Singh On their journey of Love.. 🚞

title: Back To You (#3)
description:
Aeryn Reynolds had a perfect day going on; her restaurant was bustling with customers and she couldn't be any happier about it until Everette Wilbrose walked in and Aeryn's daughter decided to play matchmaker for them.
Some bad choice of words from Everette pissed her off, completely. And she doesn't want to see his face ever again.

Throw in some money problem for Aeryn and a search for a bride for Everette and pressure from Aeryn's daughter for a father. Will she be able to tolerate being married to Everette, the self-made billionaire or her life's gonna crumble?

And especially, it's not easy for an arranged marriage to work when both of them are waiting for their long-lost childhood love.
_______________________________________________

"How can you be so sure about marrying me?", the little girl asked. "What if I am somewhere else and you are somewhere else?"

The boy smiled softly. "No matter which part of the world I am in,  I will always find my way back to you."





(In case you are wondering why the hell there's a hashtag next to the title, numbering it...go read my bio.)
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Hello and welcome to my account, my name's Ahlam, a hopeless romantic! I am a firm believer in dreams, no matter how unrealistic because like I always say, what's wrong with dreaming?

(If you are an old reader and wondering what happened to my old bio, then yes, I changed it cause well, it was kinda childish (and cringe). I gotta sound like I am twenty now.)

If you are new to my profile then please don't scroll back to my old books, they are cringe, even though they were the ones that gradually got me recognition but whatever. My personal recommendation would be to check out the Ludovica and the Alderidge series, each book in that is a standalone.

If I had to recommend one book, it would be Hidden Flames, my latest book. It's just 🤌🏼🔥❤️

Also, I gotta add this quote from my previous bio:
"A love story without romance is like pizza without cheese, and I hate pizza without cheese." (Fifteen-year-old me found this very funny.)

So, that's it!

~Ahlam <3

title: Louise
description:
Louise is a captivating novel that follows the story of Louise, a young girl who finds herself caught between her love for an aristocrat and the expectations of society.

"You swore we would always be together, that you would protect me," Louise wept, her slender frame trembling. "How could you do this to me?" Lucy tossed her lustrous brown hair over one shoulder and scoffed. "I am your superior now in every way. We may share blood, but that slave woman who birthed us was never a mother to me." But when fate flings Louise into unexpected romance with Sebastian, can their star-crossed love shatter rules denying whites and blacks alike? He cupped her face in his hands, his thumbs gently wiping away her tears. "I understand, my love," he said, his voice tender. "I will give you time, as much as you need, to come to terms with our feelings. But know this: my love for you is not something I can simply turn off or ignore. It has become the very beat of my heart, the air that I breathe."

title: Paasban
description:
Musa Jawad, a 31-year-old powerhouse, is the ruthless and enigmatic CEO of Jawad Khan Companies. With success at his feet, he is a man of few words, driven by ambition, and haunted by shadows of his past. Cold and calculated in the business world, Musa has built an empire with an iron will, never letting anyone past the fortress he's created around his heart.

Enter Zyra Inayat, a Year-old vibrant woman... hated by everyone because of her looks is left insecure. Her honey colored skin never met her live I. peace but because of her father... she still trusts the world.

What will happen when they cross paths and get married because of his sister's will? What happens when the sunshine meets the midnight rain? Will sparks fly? or will he remain cold as ever? Was it really his sister's will?

title: where darkness goes, light follows | PETER PAN ✔️
description:
What if Peter Pan wasn't always evil? What if something, or someone, was stolen from him? What if the reason Peter Pan was dying, was because he lost hope?

     Mary Gold was the niece of Rumplestiltskin, or so she believed. She was treated poorly by him, locked away where no one could find her after the curse was broken. But why didn't she regain her memories? Who was she really? Where was her happy ending?

Everyone deserves happiness, and Peter Pan 𝙣𝙚𝙫𝙚𝙧 fails.

title: ✓ | 𝐑𝐞𝐬𝐜𝐮𝐞𝐝 ♡ James Conrad
description:
𝗙!𝗢𝗖 𝘅 𝗝𝗮𝗺𝗲𝘀 𝗖𝗼𝗻𝗿𝗮𝗱
Skull Island. An uncharted island surrounded by a deadly storm, its ecosystem utterly unknown to the outside world currently suffering from the war. Lauren Hartman had accompanied her father eagerly when their team of scientists headed out to study the island without distributing its ecosystem. They didn't realize how hazardous it was.

Lauren was alone. Until she met Kong who had found her injured, the King of Skull Island found her exciting and saved her from the fate her father faced. But everything changes when an expedition team arrived at the Island with their own plans at play; Explosives that shook the land and woke the creatures hibernating underneath the soil.

Now Lauren has come face to face with an old friend, an ex-captain, scientists, and soldiers. With her kind heart, she works to help them escape the Island. But unexpected feelings develop in their time on the Island; Shared trauma in the face of death. Can Lauren break down James' walls?

title: Fighting For Family
description:
Evangeline Duke Gray is only 15, who lives with her mother and stepfather. Let's just say that her life is not so great with no friends or a parent to actually love her. She believes the lies of her classmates, bullies, and her mother and stepfather. Every day waking up to either feel numb or lonely, none to talk to or just to hug her. She is giving up on her own life and deciding to not try since she is "unwanted, unloved, worthless, ugly, fat, and so on". That is until her father and mother and 4 older brothers who have been looking for her eagerly show up at her school. Join Evangeline as her family fights for her and shows her that she is worth fighting for. However, it won't be easy as Evangeline has been broken many times that she became shy, timid, and quiet. Let's see how far her new family tries everything to show their beloved daughter and sister that she is worthy. 
    Secrets will be revealed, bonds will grow strong, but most importantly family will fight for each other.
  
  * It might start boring a bit in the beginning, but it will get better.

She smokes and considers sex a sport. She doesn't have sex with one man twice, but she engages in sexual activities more than twice a week.

A week can be a long time for a woman like Cameron to go without sex or her cigarette, but will she be tamed by Nathaniel?

title: Unforgettable whispers
description:
You are the newest, and youngest, member of the Avengers. You love being on the team, but it comes with its challenges. Almost every night you find yourself waking up screaming from the nightmares that control your mind. The nightmares only get worse when Loki is brought to Stark tower. The AllFather banished him from Asgard until he seemed it fit for him to return. As the days go on, you find yourself wanting to spend time with him. You find yourself falling for the handsome prince, and little do you know, he reciprocates the feelings.

title: Married To The Ruthless Billionaire (Completed)✅
description:
"Ellen open the door" 'Ellen I said open this damn door or I will break it down'
He broke the door open, barging into the bathroom. There laid Ellen inside the bathtub filled with bubbles and then she flipped her puffy eyes open to connect hers with her ruthless husband's. Looking into those deep brown eyes flooded with rage, about to rain brimstones and fire. 

He went and grabbed her hair, yanking it very hard but she made no attempt to pull off his arm rather she tightened her grip on the bathtub suppressing the tears that threatened to fall not wanting to give him the satisfaction of seeing her cry.




Collins Moore a ruthless beast of age 26, forced by his dad to get married to his debtor's daughter to clear up his debt. Not believing in love, a selfish, arrogant and proud jerk, ruling the business world. Just one glare from him could make you fall to your feet without knowing. Never sparing his enemies and those who go against him.


Ellen Evans a simple, naive girl of age 21 sold out by her father to clear up his debt. 


How will two people of different worlds stay under the same roof and work out their marriage?


Will they be able to sort out their differences?

Will it be a happy ending for both of them or a sad ending 

Sorry dear viewers, the chapters aren't going to be long to your liking but I hope you enjoy it.


This is my first story on Wattpad.

Please vote and comment. Thank you.

title: Flatmates and Fiascos | Jenlisa
description:
Jennie, a cheerful romance writer, ends up living with Lisa, a grumpy but stunningly attractive lawyer. Lisa only agreed to the arrangement because she thought Jennie was her cousin's "boring" friend. Jennie, however, turns out to be anything but boring. After being left in debt by her ex, Jennie's life is a bit chaotic, she's messy and carefree, while Lisa is all about peace, order, and sticking to a strict schedule. Things get even more crazier when they have to pretend as a couple to save their apartment, their lives become even more complicated and unexpectedly romantic.

title: His Little Princess | completed
description:
Bad boys: people view them as unfit fathers. Why? Well, their bad boy lifestyle of course.

That's where Asher Cain comes in. Throughout his whole high school life, he was that mysterious bad boy player. Drugs, underage drinking, sleeping around.. That's what he got into.

And then we have the innocent one: Juliet Harp. Juliet falls for his charm and ends up falling into bed with him too. It wasn't like a high school fling, it was more of a I've-just-got-out-of-a-relationship and I-want-to-have-a-one-night-stand sort of fling. That's essentially what it was, fresh out of high school and fresh out of a relationship. Juliet found herself in bed with Asher and then, a few months down the line, finds herself pregnant with his baby.

They weren't ever really friends, just acquaintances.

Well, Juliet dies when her daughter, Victoria, was only four. And you'll never guess which doorstep Victoria finds herself at?


-

title: Somebody To Love (#4)
description:
Harper Collins was an orphan who spent the first seventeen years of her life in an orphanage. Life in an orphanage is not easy but she dealt with everything courageously. But an incident at the age of seventeen caused her to run away. Not wanting to look back at it ever.

Time flew by, she was now working in a restaurant as a chef alongside her friend who owned the restaurant. Her boyfriend of two years, proposed her for marriage. She couldn't be anymore happy. Everything was perfect now.

But that's what she thought.

Her engagement broke off.

Broken, she decided to forget about everything for just one night. And that's how she finds herself at a club where she bumps into her friend's brother-in-law.

What harm could a one night stand do for a girl who's trying to forget everything?

Untill, she finds herself pregnant with the hot, famous, billionaire, playboy, Gareth Wilbrose's child.



*Sequel to my story 'Back To You' but can be read as a stand alone novel.*


(In case you are wondering why the hell there's a hashtag next to the title, numbering it...go read my bio.)
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Hello and welcome to my account, my name's Ahlam, a hopeless romantic! I am a firm believer in dreams, no matter how unrealistic because like I always say, what's wrong with dreaming?

(If you are an old reader and wondering what happened to my old bio, then yes, I changed it cause well, it was kinda childish (and cringe). I gotta sound like I am twenty now.)

If you are new to my profile then please don't scroll back to my old books, they are cringe, even though they were the ones that gradually got me recognition but whatever. My personal recommendation would be to check out the Ludovica and the Alderidge series, each book in that is a standalone.

If I had to recommend one book, it would be Hidden Flames, my latest book. It's just 🤌🏼🔥❤️

Also, I gotta add this quote from my previous bio:
"A love story without romance is like pizza without cheese, and I hate pizza without cheese." (Fifteen-year-old me found this very funny.)

So, that's it!

~Ahlam <3

title: affectionate
description:
"He watched me. And I could feel it. The skin on my neck tingled and a staticky feeling ran down the length of my spine. I had never felt this way before."

Fallon Everskies was searching for something. Answers, maybe, as to why the touch of others burned her. And why her parents constantly kept secrets from her. But most of all, and embarrassingly so, she was searching for love. 


"She was infuriating. I could smell her, feel her, and taste her even when she was miles away. It drove me insane, she drove me insane. Yet, I yearned for her touch, begged for her entire being. But I knew I couldn't have it." 

Lucius Dendron hadn't felt alive in years. There were more...obvious reasons as to why this was. But the main reason was plain and simple; he was lonely. Even if he himself didn't want to admit it.

title: Stranger on Flight
description:
Meet Zoya Haider , a young woman with a huge heart, an irrepressible spirit, huge ass insecurities. and a few little secrets : Secrets that she pledged never to tell . Because that's what secrets are for. Until she sits on a flight to Islamabad, reluctantly to attend the wedding which she was lowkey avoiding.

And during a slight turbulence which didn't feel slight to her-nervous-flyer-self, she founds herself spilling the secrets (she thought was going to take to her grave) to a handsome but a rude stranger on a plane. Why are handsome men , such jerks? A question which Zoya pounders upon while she sits with him spilling her guts out. 

He was a stranger. He was supposed to be a stranger...Until she comes face-to-face with him on the wedding she didn't want to attend. Just her luck the handsome jerk who knows more about her than her parents and friends combined is none other than Irtaza Haider Awan . The groom's cousin, come best friend, aka the best man if there was any in desi weddings. A man who knows every single humiliating detail about her.

What happens when she have to spend two weeks and look at him knowing he know stupid stuff about her? What happens when her insecurities are slapped in her face by none other than the person she told them to ? How is  supposed to recover when all her secrets come out? 

Join Zoya and Irtaza as they attend a wedding they both were avoiding . Only to find that it wasn't bad at all? Or was it ?

URDU TRANSLATIONS AVAILABLE

title: My Destined Mate
description:
A rude and unfriendly alpha from slums, whom everyone avoids as he is the 'bad news'. And a mighty chaebol prince omega who gets everything his eyes lands on with out any effort. But things took a turn when they crossed paths. 

Khaotung has always been a lonely sole has no one dared to approach him, and he preferred it that way too. Handsomeness of khaotung attracted everyone's eyes but there was something invisible for eyes other than his obvious cold and rude personality. 

As for First nothing is impossible growing up in one of the most wealthiest and powerful family as the youngest prince made everything way too easy for him. He is a free soul loved by everyone. But things might not be all glitter and roses as people see it from outside. 

When two people from different worlds meet even destiny will side with them or else First will buy the destiny, simple right? But there is one problem in the way of First's desired forever with his destined mate. The alpha himself, Khaotung!!!

title: It's All You... [Arshi]
description:
:::On-Going:::

(01.11.2018)

**Reached 10k Reads (30.12.2018)**

**Reached 1k votes [5th Chapter] (26.12.2018)**

Based on Sheetal's Track..

It is not a lack of love, but a lack of friendship that makes unhappy marriages.
                                       - Friedrich Nietzsche

He reiterates that he cannot live without her.. But couldn't give her the assurance she deserved..

For her, he is her world.. The one around whom her whole life revolves..

She felt her self-respect deteriorating with his ignorance, while all he thought is to not hurt his wife in his aggression.

She felt the need for his attention, but he wanted her to understand that he cannot always give her that.

With her qualms and dealing with her husband, Arnav's, ignorance & unsaid demands, Khushi felt her world collapse. 

Not knowing what he is stepping into by initiating the ignorance towards Khushi, Arnav is set to enter a zone where his past opens up, pushes his present into a probable downfall and brings a future which is uncertain. As yet.

And unknown to them the third person starts using up the situations to her advantage.

With his sister by his side, Arnav is set to bring back his wife, his life, his Khushi. Because ASR maybe ignorant to things around him but not dumb to not set things right after knowing about them.

Join the journey of Arnav Singh Raizada as this time he literally sweeps his love, Khushi, of her feet as he becomes expressive, understanding and a prince husband that Khushi always dreamt about.

Happy Reading :)

🤗🤗 Cover Credit: M.M Creations aka @MeghaMigalani on Wattpad 🤗🤗

title: Daughter For A Day
description:
Leonard announces his intention to go to a costume party dressed as a girl and turns to his Mother for help. This was something she never imagined happening to her. 

This story is her account of that event. 

She agrees to help her son, but as the events unfold, she has to stop and ask herself, whose dream are they really fulfilling, his or hers?

*This story was written by Sabrynabrooklynne on Wattpad. If you aren't reading it there, it's been stolen. Please report the website. It's probably not the final version either.*
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
A mildly popular Wattpad writer, Sabrynabrooklynne puts her heart and soul into her writing. Once you take the plunge into one of her books, you'll  finish it and  want to read another.
You'll find she likes to intertwine her stories, setting several of them in the same area and time frame, causing events and characters to overlap.  It's a unique approach that has the potential to surprise and delight.

You won't be disappointed.

                              - Laindzy

===========

Welcome friends and stalkers. Be sure to leave comments on my stories as you read them. I truly want to know what you think.

Spent 7 years in South Korea and I still can't understand too many words in Korean beyond hello, thank you, you're welcome, and the names of a ton of foods, but I don't care, I LOVED Korea and can't wait to return someday!

You know what bugs me? --ghost readers. You never know what they thought of your work. You can only assume they hated it.

Favorite Food: DeepHouse and k-pop
Favorite Color: 17
Favorite Number: July
Favorite Month: Pizza
Favorite Music: Purple
Favorite Story On Wattpad: A Cinderella Story the IV by @lexbugplus5

I love to joke and have a good time

I Love reading well written stories.


After reading my story, if you think you could make a better cover than the one I currently have, make it and send me a link. I'll let you know what I think and I may just use it.

I ❤️ reading comments. Good or bad, tell me what you think and please, please give me suggestions to improve my stories, as well as point out errors I may have missed so I can fix them.
Newlywed, so I won't be updating as often as before (you can blame my nypho husband)

title: MAQAAM
description:
A short story defining the stages of love. 

Inara Khan was petulant: stubborn, short-tempered, blunt, and a middle child. She had her life planned until she stumbled on a betrayal by one she had never considered a possibility from. 

Life threw a curve ball to her in name of Rahil Sohail, a smart man who wasn't all smart when it came to his emotions. He was famous for less words, more glares, and definitely a straightforwardness she appreciated. 

He was considered to be less from others, disrespected for what he didn't have until he stood for her respect. 

For, respect was all she wanted. 
✷ ✷ ✷
Rahil Sohail had worked his entire life towards reaching his destiny, unknown to the said destiny being a mischief maker and the daughter of the man he had came to know at his weakest. 
This marriage was supposed to be a promise, an arrangement to honor his father's best friend until his daughter became more. 

She was a storm, brewing and ready to rearrange his entire life. 

Not that he would want her to stop. 

Start date: 21/03/2024

Alexandra Grey, but more commonly going by Alex, is planning on attending the planned annual senior trip with her class to Rio de Janeiro. She figures it would be one hell of a trip considering there were no parents and unlimited alcohol, but when she boards the plane a bad omen sits next to her. title: All Aboard
description:
"Well, are you coming?"

It took a few moments for her to register what he meant. 
"I... I-I'm sorry sir, but I haven't any money. Much less a ticket." The shameful words fell from her frozen lips before she could think to stop them.

The conductor's hazel eyes softened behind his glasses, but he couldn't stop his lip from curling up in a slight, amused smile. "After all these years, you just might be the first person who hasn't asked where we're going."

The Polar Express has always been known for bringing children on a round-trip to the North Pole once a year, but little do most people know that it never truly stops its course. When the holidays are over, the outcasts of the world find themselves aboard its mysterious tracks, on their way to rekindle their purpose by embarking on a journey to the North Pole. Elaine, a homeless woman stripped of everything she held dear, finds herself on an adventure like no other full of friendship, discovery, and love. Can a mystical train help guide her like it did for the children in need of faith? Or will things simply go back to the way they were before when it's all over?
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio: I believe in romance, love, and empathy. All my stories have happy endings even if they follow the broken hearted villains we know. I replace their hate with love, and expand upon their perspectives. I make my readers laugh, and I make them cry. I promise I will make you happy along the journey. I will finish your dreams' wishes, and I will keep writing to share my infinite creativity with you.

title: Big Boys Don't Cry (published under PHR)
description:
Isang babae lang ang bukod tanging nakapagpaiyak kay Vince. But it was a long time ago. And he promised himself that it wouldn't happen again. Then he met Valjean. Ang snob at masungit niyang private nurse na pinili ng mga kaibigan niya para sa kanya. She almost make him cry everytime na tuturukan siya nito ng kinakatakutan niyang injection. Madalas tuloy siyang tuksuhin nito na cry baby. Ngunit imbes na mainis ay natagpuan na lamang niya ang sarili na nahuhulog na pala rito.
But Valjean suddenly disappeared. Kasunod nang pagkakatuklas ni Vince nang tunay nitong pagkatao. She was the girl he's been looking for a long time- his long lost first love and the missing piece in his life. Again, no trace of her everywhere. Naulit muli ang nangyari sampung taon na ang nakakaraan. And for the second time around... will she make him cry again?

©2014

title: Neighbor in apartment 143 your boyfriend is cheating on you • minsung
description:
Jisung, a curious and observant young man, discovers that his neighbor from apartment 143 is being cheated on. Lacking the courage to confront him directly, Jisung attempts to warn him subtly by changing the name of his Wi-Fi network to "Neighbor in Apt 143, Your BF Is Cheating on You." However, when he realizes that his tactic isn't working and the infidelity continues, Jisung is forced to face his fears. He ultimately decides to speak to his neighbor in person, grappling with the dilemma of revealing the truth or continuing to silently watch from the sidelines.
