title: Love for sale
description:
"I want to have you exclusively mine for a month." Lisa declared coldly. "Make it two or three for as long as you can still make me arouse."

"Take your itch somewhere else, Lisa. There are lots of women out there who are willing to do whatever you want for free." Jennie answered while gritting her teeth.

"You don't understand." Lisa shook her head. "I want YOU. So take this as an opportunity while I'm still crazy over you."

Jennie glared at her. "You are a monster! You're just after my body!"

"And you are just after my money so we're even." 

It would've been much easier if what she said was right. But because Jennie never thought of money when she first took her, it made everything a lot more complicated...

title: Forget Me Not
description:
FINISHED STORY !!
    *Fanfiction*
! CLICHE LOVE STORY A HEAD !
She pulled into the drive way of her mansion and noticed a blue Honda Accord parked in the driveway.She didn't know anyone who owned this vehicle. Her heart sunk to the bottom of her chest.

She proceeded to park her car but instead of parking in the garage she decided to park in front of the house incase someone was inside, she didn't  want them to hear the garage door and hide. Mai wanted to believe her husband would never hurt her and that he loved her.

Praying her thoughts weren't true she walked quietly to the front door, inserted the key, and slowly opened the door.

She snuck upstairs heading to the bedroom she shared with her husband and began hearing faint sounds and as she got closer they were moans.

DUN! DUN! DUUUNNNN! 
 
♡ IF YOU WANT TO KNOW WHAT HAPPENDS READ THE STORY ♡

title: His Happiness (Beastars-Legosi fanfic)
description:
**IN THE PROCESS OF BEING EDITED AND REWRITTEN, FIND NEW VERSION UNDER THE TITLE HIS HAPPINESS, HER DEMISE**

#1 in Carnivores
#1 in Herbivores
#4 in Beastars
#5 in Animal

**Author Note**
This book has lots of time skips

It's a (roughly) average day in the life of Legosi, in class with his best and closest friend Jack.

A new student joins their class, Okami. A tall female wolf with long white fur and the most peculiar honey eyes.

After being put in slightly awkward circumstances having to room with the boys, she becomes very close to Legosi. Okami wants him to notice her like he does with Haru, but she knows she's not the one, she's not his happiness.

But she'll be damned if she lets anything, or anyone, ruin his happiness. Even if it's not her.

***I DO NOT OWN ANY OF THE ORIGINAL BEASTARS CHARACTERS, ONLY THE ONES I CREATE IN ORDER TO GO ALONG WITH MY PLOT LINE***

title: Obsession | ✔
description:
He watched her wordlessly. She was beautiful in his eyes. She wasn't like the others he had previously killed for joy, for satisfaction. She was without a doubt made for him, he thought. Her whole existence was for him. Only him. He grinned from within the shadows. Soon he'd have her for himself. Soon she would see him and feel the same way. This, after all, in his eyes, was destiny.

P.s. There is a prequel/sequel up on my page, Obsession is more like the side story that goes with it. It doesn't matter which one you read first.

title: Twitterpated
description:
Book #1 in the 'Roundabout Series'

Twitterpated
(adj.) excited or overcome with romantic feelings ;smitten ; love-struck 
_______________

"You okay? Your face is all red" Aiden stepped closer, concern swirling in that low lidded emerald gaze of his. 

Matias' heart rate increased at their proximity. He averted his gaze once more, suddenly not having the courage to look the beautiful brunette in the eyes as he stumbled over his words

 "mm? Yeah you're just hot, shit I mean I'm just hot. Yeah, I'm just getting hot" he clenched his eyes shut, placing a hand over his face as if that would save him from the embarrassment he was currently facing, aka, himself. When he spoke again, his voice was so soft, it may as well have been considered a whisper "it's just hot in here is all"

_______________

title: A Blue Reality
description:
Alina Freeze was special. 

She was special in many different ways. 

She was too special for the world, so she went away to live in another reality where she was perfect. 

She was the perfect butterfly, the perfect little girl for Dr. William and Dr. Carlton to love for all eternity. At first, she was unsure and didn't understand what was hoped of her, but after some time, love, and acceptance, she came to love her new reality. 

To the outside world, she was different. But, in her new reality, where she was loved and adored in so many ways, she was extraordinary. She was worth more than anything anyone could possibly give her, she was out of this world. 

She was perfect and right where she belonged. 

.........

A re-telling of Alina Freeze and her adventures with her two Daddies, along with two pink and blue nurses, A Blue Reality welcomes you into Blue Health. A collection of stories and tales of how Alina Freeze came to be their little girl and how Dr. William and Dr. Carlton fell head over heels in love with their Little One, get ready to re-enter Another Reality in a very different light (or color?). Get ready for some fluff, some cuddles, some little boo-boos here and there, and come join the family fun.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
If you want to find the author of this account, you'll most likely find her under our current care where we can keep her little imagination in check and from running wild. Here at Blue Health, where we make the future a possibility and make what we want into reality, we carry the heart of the future.

A place to plan and prepare on a reality soon-to-be, we, Dr. William and Dr. Carlton, welcome you to our home. Blue Health serves to better the world of medicine and innovate the possibilities of tomorrow.


If you're feeling unwell, don't be afraid to let us know, and we'll get you into Blue Health as soon as possible.  We look forward to caring for you and bringing about a new era of our time.
#BlueHealthTakeOver

title: The Contract ✔
description:
"I know you only care, not because you love me, but because you love what is in me." She said and turned away, afraid of what he was going to say, how he was going to reject her.

He hushed her and pulled her to him so they was no space in between, and placed his lips on hers. He pulled away and looked at her, a whirlwind of emotions in his eyes, and then spoke again. 

"At first, I only cared about the baby, not you. But now I want you. Because I've fallen in love with all of you. It's no longer my baby; it's now our baby."

Then she pulled him back to her, to finish what he started. 

...

Tobi Ademi, the third richest man in Nigeria has everything an average guy wants: wealth, fame and of course, an endless supply of women.

A total control freak, he prefers to be in charge of everything; even the way he gets an heir to his empire. He decides to hire beautiful but uncontrollable, Abena Omotosho, or rather, he rents her womb. 

He gradually moves from his daily routine of life, to something much more worthwhile. Something called, 'living in the moment'.

And then he realizes, that he can't control everything, especially not love, because once love chooses you, there are only three words for you: out of control.

...

It's a contract: simply business and no strings attached, but no business deal is that easy, and especially not this one.

...

title: Entangled Love (6yr leap)
description:
*SPORADIC UPDATES*

Another closure story on my beloved OGabhira - ( The plot is a rewritten POV of how things could have proceeded after Niel's death. If they really wanted to take another leap so badly they could have used a similar plot where we fans could have got a great Abhira reunion and the show could have also retained its Rishta vibes.)

With each episode, my belief of Abhira getting back together shatters, and it hurts like hell to see DKP sinking my ship to no return. Hence, I have decided to rewrite their journey after the six-year leap. 
There will be major changes from the show. Some new characters will be introduced and some old ones will be given a proper remorse and redeeming attitude and not be completely whitewashed.

Dive in for a better understanding and enjoy the ABHIRA REUNION.

title: Forced Love✔
description:
© 2018 All Rights Reserved

Yusrah's life takes a dramatic turn when her parents decide to get her married to Masoud Abdullah.

That wasn't the life Yusrah wanted for herself. She wanted to go through college, get a nice job and finally settle with the man of her dreams but all hopes were shattered the moment her marriage was brought up.

Being the only girl amongst three children, she decides to respect her parents decision to make them happy. 

She agrees to the marriage and decides she would give her all and learn to love Masoud. 

But what happens when Masoud doesn't try to make the relationship work?

Join Yusrah in this thrilling tale of marriage and how quickly hate can turn into love.

title: Kismat Connection
description:
Manik is a rich city-dweller and has everything a person would want - loving parents, very good looks, intelligence, good friends, a girl friend who is no less than a model and the list goes on. He cares only for his friends and family. He is passionate about music.

Nandini on the other hand is a villager and doesn't belong to a well to do family. Problems are a part and parcel of her life. She lost her parents when she was little and she has been staying with her grandmother since then. Her current problem is that her family wants to marry her off though she isn't interested. She has her own goals that she is hoping to achieve. She cares about every living being. She is good at music, but it isn't her passion.

How do these two people, who are leading different lifestyles and who have different ideals, meet? What is the outcome of their meeting? Do they meet only to go on their own ways or do they end up forming some sort of a connection? Where does this lead them to?

authorBio:
My Journey 
                 
When I began I was no writer,
   Appreciation from you, my dear reader
Inspired me to nurture my meager skill,
   And turn writing into a thrill 

Writing for me started as a one-shot,  
  That also meant it would be my last-shot
Words of encouragement made it the first,
  One led to another, and writing became a quest 
   
Mind began to explore,
     Imagination gained wings and began to soar
Ideas sprouting in the mind,
     Along with experiences combined
A rich language and reader's words of praise,
     What more is required for a writer to raise!

In my journey as a writer
       I have managed to come so far
Continued support from you, my dear reader
       raises my hope to shoot for the star

                                               - shining_polestar

title: Wolves & Wildflowers| ongoing
description:
In a quiet, devoutly religious town, 19-year-old Emily struggles with the suffocating expectations of her overbearing mother and the shadows of her father's mysterious death years ago. When a series of gruesome murders begins targeting young women, fear ripples through the community, and Emily finds herself inexplicably drawn to the enigmatic and dangerous Wyatt, her charming neighbor with a hidden reputation.

As Emily grapples with her growing defiance against her mother and the awakening of forbidden desires, she begins to sense that the town's secrets run deeper than anyone dares to admit. With the arrival of Samuel, an old family friend determined to protect them, and unsettling memories of her father resurfacing, Emily starts to uncover fragments of a haunting truth buried in her past.

But the closer she gets to the answers, the more she realizes that safety is an illusion-and the greatest danger might not be lurking in the woods but within the walls of her own home.

title: Ethan Landry : Oneshots - Scream 6
description:
"Why do you hate me?" He asks.

"Come on." I answered, rolling my eyes at him.

"No. Seriously, what have I done to make you hate me?"

"You know."

"No, I don't know. Use your fucking words." Hearing Ethan swear stunned me. I have never seen him like this. I look up at him, as he's waiting for my answer.

"Well..." I start. "You always ignore me!"

"Is that it?"

"It, well, yeah. Ignoring people is rude. You're rude." I explain.

"Huh? Is that all?" I can see something of a grin appear on his lips. I roll my eyes and look away, but he grabbed my chin and forced me to look at him. Ethan leaned in closer. My thoughts were screaming inside of my head, while my heart stopped beating for a moment. Is he gonna kiss me? Why is he so close? And why was I allowing it to happen?

-

Different one shots of Ethan Landry from Scream 6. They are not connected to each other unless it's written otherwise.
WARNING FOR SPOILERS!
I don't own any of the characters from Scream 6.

title: Nothing Else To Lose (Hunger Games Fanfiction Male Oc)
description:
Cedric Mintz is from District 14, the only district that isn't allowed to participate in the Hunger Games due to it's only purpose, being ready to repopulate the earth if it is ever necessary. Finally after years and years of not being allowed to participate at the 74th Hunger Games they allow District 14 to enter in one boy. The District only has males and sending in two boys would be unfair to the rest of the districts seeing as most boys in that District have a strong bond and would team up. 

When Cedric's name is pulled he and the rest of the boys are thrilled. Cedric is an extremely attractive boy who seems charming, enthusiastic, and naive when in reality he's already planned six different ways to bury your body. 
Even better, he planned on going into the games even if his name wasn't chosen. He wants to be there, but why? 

(This story had blood, murder, and if you know the Hunger games at all then you know. Also, this is following the movies so dear Hunger Game readers I'm sorry for ruining it. I wrote this because we don't have a single Male OC Hunger Games story and I think that is stupid! Pardon my French. Anyway, read, vote, comment, follow, enjoy!)

title: The Hoax
description:
A YOONKOOK SHORT STORY!

Recently dumped, heartbroken, and unwilling to move on, Yoongi spends his days wallowing in self-pity. He's trying to tell himself he doesn't need anyone or anything, but he knows better. He's a hot mess.

He somehow finds himself at a party when his ex walks in, looking completely healed following their break-up. In a desperate attempt to appear unfazed, Yoongi pretends to be dating the person closest to him: an impossibly cute-slash-sexy boy who quite literally ran into him head first.

What happens when you put two unlikely characters together: an unexpected match made in heaven or complete chaos?

✔ Language

authorBio:
‼️

I would like to start this off with a disappointing news, I am not back to write new books or to continue writing my on-going books. I came back here as I have decided to revise my old books. This is something I have thought of way back since I was still active here. However, before, I was too busy wanting to write new books that I didn't have time to insert the plan of revising my old books. Even when I took a LONG break, I only had the thought of wanting to revise my old books so bad, but I didn't have time because I was trying to catch up and adjust in college. Though, I'm still going through a lot in college, but the conscience in me has been bugging me to go back and settle my unresolved business. Continuing my on-going book is also an unsettled business, but I personally made a choice to prioritize my old books more.

Regarding the order of books I will make revisions, it's in random order. I will just pick what I feel I want to revise first and next. But rest assured, I will definitely try my very best to rewrite and revise everything. If then, I get my spark back, I'll continue my on-going books.

For now, let's go down to the memory lane together 💗

title: Written in the stars
description:
Manik and Nandini, both are heading in different directions in their lives. Nandini is all set to marry her boyfriend, Arya. Manik has decided that his girlfriend, Alya is going to be his life partner in the future. 
Fate brings them together, but when one is not even ready to accept the relationship, what can the other do. So they decide to separate at the earliest.
What is written in their stars? Do they separate or do they find their way towards each other?

authorBio:
My Journey 
                 
When I began I was no writer,
   Appreciation from you, my dear reader
Inspired me to nurture my meager skill,
   And turn writing into a thrill 

Writing for me started as a one-shot,  
  That also meant it would be my last-shot
Words of encouragement made it the first,
  One led to another, and writing became a quest 
   
Mind began to explore,
     Imagination gained wings and began to soar
Ideas sprouting in the mind,
     Along with experiences combined
A rich language and reader's words of praise,
     What more is required for a writer to raise!

In my journey as a writer
       I have managed to come so far
Continued support from you, my dear reader
       raises my hope to shoot for the star

                                               - shining_polestar

title: Destiny ✓
description:
❝ Some people can control their destiny while some can't ❞


Those soft lips perfectly fit mine and the sync with which they moved against mine was perfect. The kiss was slow and passionate, but soon he broke the kiss and pushed me away, making me confused by his action. 

I tried to approach him but he stepped back before speaking. Hearing his words, my whole world collapsed in no time.

"Let's break up."

description:
#1 in Short-story
"Arnav,
I love you so much... 
Please never Break my heart... 
Or else I won't be able to heal it again...
I just can't even think about it,because for me you're my everything... "her words still roaming in my ears... 

But you know every love story has Villon... 

My had too... 

And that Villon is no one else but 

Arnav Singh Raizada, myself. 

What one can do when that person himself destroyed the best gift god has written in his destiny. 

I had ruined it.

But 

I'm determined to heal it completely one day. 

And that one day will surely come one day.

She'll surely give me a SECOND CHANCE.

title: Gingerbread Latte
description:
I had a plan; Go to college, have sex and years later become a doctor. Easy and simple, right? 

Yeah, well that was the idea until a family secret came out and flipped my whole world upside down. 
Fast forward to an accident and a kidney transplant later, I have no clue who I am or what I want anymore. 

That's when she came tumbling into my life; a red-headed stranger on the hospital's rooftop, she dragged me right off the edge, stopping me from jumping when I totally wasn't about to, thought my parents are homosexual and refused to tell me her name...I mean, isn't that how epic romance stories start? 

Yeah, but we have a big problem here; she is totally resistant to my charm. She dislikes me, doesn't trust me, and thinks of me like any other jock on campus. Her rejection and disinterest are filling me with the need to prove her wrong. 

A deal strikes; hours of tutoring sessions and gingerbread lattes are bound to show her who I really am. 
Her story, I want it.
Her trust, I'll gain it. 

But as I do so, I must tread carefully, because like they say, too much ginger could cause a heartburn; and my heart, it definitely can't bear another ache.

title: CHRISTMAS LIGHTS - One Shot Collection [L.S]
description:
» 𝙲𝚘𝚖𝚙𝚕𝚎𝚝𝚎 «

Harry only has his grandmother, who married John Tomlinson after his grandfather passed away.

When they met, they moved to the big apple.

Now during the holidays season, Harry's grandmother asked him to travel and visit her.
Harry does it, only to find that they weren't just the two of them, but that the entire Tomlinson family will be there as well. 

And there were lots of them.


🎄


I update this every December. 
This is a story of a family through the years.

He wanted me

title: Supercorp one-shots
description:
A journey between Kara and Lena, from complete strangers, to 'best friends', to a couple and to a married couple. Of course, our emotions will be all over the place. There's gonna be happy and cute mini stories, to sad and painful stories. 

The stories are not connected, unless I say (write) so. Feel free to request me anything and I will try my best to write your wish!

authorBio: I actually hated writing till I just suddenly started doing it. And I also love food...I really love food and im serious (I don't like to share my food).

title: Loco At Midnight Calls ⚊ Enhypen Ni-ki Text AU
description:
"Hell -"

"I'm so sorry, Mom. I forgot to call you in the morning"

"Don't worry dear.. I can live without hearing your voice"

[ beeps ]

[ calls again a few minutes later.. ]

"Why did you not tell me you're not my mother!?"

"How can you be so stupid?"

"Say what?!"

☏ ⚊ ☏

When Ni-ki accidentally calls a wrong number, he meets Y/N, a sarcastic and witty girl, perfect for him as you can imagine.

Amidst midnight calls and constant bickering, can they become anything more than two bored people who call each other everyday?

This is a story of a savage charmer and a wannabe joker.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
🪽 | INTP | Ravenclaw | Jay Bias | Capricorn

✧･ﾟ Writer of unedited ENHYPEN fanfics. 
✧･ﾟ Grounded in reality, devoted to Jay and literature. 
✧･ﾟ Gehlee Dangca fangirl, JayHoon storyteller. 
✧･ﾟ IT student balancing code and college life. 
✧･ﾟ Updates may be infrequent - college comes first. 
✧･ﾟ Translations welcomed, with proper credit.

title: _නොනිමි_
description:
කඳුලු වලට ඔයාගෙ කම්මුල් තෙමන්න දෙන්නෙ නෑ මන්...
ඔයා මගේ ජීවිතේට ආවම මගෙ ජීවිතේම ලස්සන උනා.. මම මෙහෙම කිව්වොත්..

වේදනා කන්ද 
ආදරේ උසට
ආකහේ ගෑවුනා...
ආකහේ ඉඳන් 
හීන දෙව්දුවක්
තුන් හිතට ලං වුණා...

තුන් හිතින් වින්ද
සෝක දුක් කදුලු
ඈ නමින් පිස දමා...
ආදරේ නමට 
ගීතයක් අලුත්
තනුවකින් ලියැවුණා..."

මන් එහෙම කියලා සිතූගෙ නලලට හාදුවක් දුන්නා..

                  -නොනිමි

title: At His Command
description:
I'm Sienna Amato, the author of exactly one erotic novel. It hit the bestseller lists and I made millions. Too bad my publishing company screwed me over.

Now I'm destitute. To make matters worse, I'm suffering from writer's block and my mom's in an expensive nursing home. I need money, fast. When I apply for a position at a publishing company as a secretary, I'm hoping for a simple nine-to-five job.

But the publishing company's CEO has other plans. Tristan Black wants me to write a book that he's sure will be a bestseller. It involves sexual games. Between the two of us.

Did I mention that I'm a virgin?
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Hi, I'm Tamara Lush and I write steamy romance. Under the name Tara Lush I write quirky mysteries. I'm a 2018 RWA Rita Finalist, an Amtrak Writing Fellow, and a USA Today bestselling author. I'm also an award-winning journalist, a wife, and a dog mom.

My books DRIVE and CRASH were published by W by Wattpad Books - and the third book in the trilogy, BURN, comes out in March 2024!

Find me on Instagram and say hi! https://www.instagram.com/the.book.lush

title: Cancer Romance (Bully AU, completed)
description:
"I hate the ones who are weak and no one can be more weaker than you miss. y/n, so I hate you too"

Only you know how strong you were to hide the life taking pain into yourself. only you know how hard it is to swallow all the screams and stay quiet when you want to cry. Only you know how difficult it is to bring that smile on your face, when it's uncertain if you can smile again.

Kim Taehyung, hates weakness and you are the weakest in his knowledge, it's his prime passion to make your life hell, until that day

"Kim Taehyung, doesn't like to repeat what he said, if anyone tries to hurt Park Y/N, from this moment, you will pick a rivalry with me. Then what will be the consequences you all know better"

But the craters of his wounds are too deep to get forgiveness, 

"don't talk to me ever, don't do anything for me, just stay away from me"

What will be the beginning and the end of their love story?

title: Caged
description:
A Bride is waiting in her room which is fully decorated as it is her wedding night, she is the most happiest person today.

Soon she can hear footsteps approaching room, she corrected her veil and took a deep breathe.
The door locked sound made her to know that her husband came.

She can see her husband coming to her walking wobbly, he missed his balance and stumbled on something which fell on floor.

She understood he can't walk properly as his leg got injured, she wanted to help him but he managed himself and reached bed.

His hand approached her and took out her veil revealing her face, slowly she tilted her head up to see her prince charming.

But to her shock he is not his husband, but he is his brother.

" what are you doing here?? Where is my husband" she asked in tense to which he gave a smirk.

" I'm your husband, am I not?" he stammered as he is drunk and stepped forward to touch her.

She jerked away and ran out of room and bumped into her husband.
She hugged him and Sobbed.😭

" where are you, I was waiting for you but your brother...." she paused as he interrupted her.

" today is our wedding night I know, but today Is my brother's turn go and spend it with him" said her husband shattering earth below her feet.

😐

" what are you saying?? I am your wife, how can you say so, are you not ashamed??" She yelled at her husband.

Hearing the shouts her mother in law came there, the bride ran to her and said about the incident for which she said -

" what's wrong in it, you are married to them, now I don't understand why are you feeling bad to spend your night with one of your husband"

" you are THEIR'S  Komal" added her mother in law.



Komal life got shattered on the day itself when she married to not one but TWo men.😰

but fate played it's card and the cycle of Rebirth emerged, she is reborn.

Will she able to face those Two men  or will she again become Their prey??🤷‍♀️



Join journey of Komal, in her two lives 🥰
Tous Droits Réservés

title: The Secret Between Us | JJK
description:
❝Dad this is ridiculous. How am I supposed to live with her?❞

Three thousand billion years later~

❝Kang Y/n❞ he yelled from behind earning everyone's attention. 

And the next thing you heard him yelling is, ❝I want to f#ck you every night and then cuddle with you until the morning FOREVER❞

❝W-What kind of... confession is that?❞ you said before hiding your red cheeks due to embarrassment.

..............................

A simple girl, Y/n, who struggles hard for her family, consisting hatred towards rich people due to bitter past. 

Y/n has to take care of her sick mother and little brother along with a huge amount of loan. 

On the other hand, 

Jeon Jungkook, is the young spoilt son of his parents, knows nothing but money and power. 

Mr. Jeon wanted to hand over his company to young son, but he's afraid of losing all the hard work he did to make a successful business. 

Mr. & Mrs. Jeon wants their son to experience the true nature of life. 
They wants him to know how to struggle without help and how to survive by own. 

In a circumstances they made a six months contract between Jungkook and Y/n.

In this six months, y/n will taught him how to struggle in return she'll get the money she needed. 

And Jungkook will get the CEO position of his dad's company. 

But why they choosed y/n? Coincidence or Planning?

..............................

Do you think, they can survive until the end?

Do you think spoilt Jungkook can make her forget the past she has known since childhood? 

Most importantly, will he be able to make her fall in love with him, a rich man? 

So, let's take a part in their journey and experience a brand new Hate-Love story.

When Rory Cooper takes part in the inter-school championship she thinks nothing more of it than a fun, school competition. Insufferable hot guys and prank wars only happen in books, right? 

Wrong. 

One chemistry disaster later, Rory has accidentally attracted the attention of Griffin Carter, the star athlete of rival school, Beckfall High, who's a known player on and off the field.

title: Forbidden Love
description:
A lot can happen in five months, but no one could have expected this.

Cold, distant and sometimes shallow, Reign never thought she'd ever find a guy to meet her very high standards or her equally high Prada pumps. 

Per usual, life comes and knocks her right on her ass bringing with it the passionate, arrogant boxer Tobias. Tobias may seem cocky on the outside but once she cracks open his hard exterior piece by piece, she's able to see the real him. 

But what if it's too late? 

An interracial story about a private African American college student and a charmingly ignorant Caucasian boxer.


Cover by me  || Updates every other day.

title: Where the heart belongs..
description:
"Look at how hard it's beating!!" He said grabbing hold of my hand and placing it on my own heart, not letting go of my hand again.

I lowered my gaze from his eyes and settled them on my hand held by his.

"Oh, don't feel embarrassed, here..." He shifted my hand upon his heart, which was beating erratically. Perhaps, even harder than mine.

"This is the effect of your presence near me." He said causing me to lower my eyes.

"Not just now suddenly but from quite a while" He added gaining my gaze yet again.
                          
                         ~~~~•••~~~~
                                                           
Maira Abdul Haseeb: A niqabi who is a fresher in college, finds herself staring a bit longer at a guy whose name she didn't even knew. 

Adam Abdullah: The boy who found it difficult to get his piquing curiousity off of a niqabi.

                          ~~~~•••~~~~

Hop in to know more about this Halal story with a gist of romance and love of the purest form.

title: Entangled
description:
Manik is the beloved son of Raj and Nyonika. He has almost everything in life, and he loves to win at everything he lays his hands on. However, there is one thing he despises, he doesn't want to get entangled in love or marriage. 

Nandini grew up in an orphanage. She was full of life earlier, but an incident changed her life and left her depressed. She has lost her purpose in life, but she is trying to move on from her past. 

Manik and Nandini cross paths as strangers, and they start off on the wrong foot. Manik's dislike towards Nandini turns into hatred, when he comes to know that she had betrayed his cousin, and he agrees to take revenge from Nandini. Is Manik successful in getting Nandini entangled in the revenge plan or does he himself get entangled in the process? How does the revenge plan affect Nandini who is already depressed?

Their lives aren't the only ones that are entangled. The lives of their dear ones are entangled too. Hop in to unravel the entanglements.

Ranking:
#1 in manan on 18th September 2023
#1 in nandini on 5th August 2023

Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
My Journey 
                 
When I began I was no writer,
   Appreciation from you, my dear reader
Inspired me to nurture my meager skill,
   And turn writing into a thrill 

Writing for me started as a one-shot,  
  That also meant it would be my last-shot
Words of encouragement made it the first,
  One led to another, and writing became a quest 
   
Mind began to explore,
     Imagination gained wings and began to soar
Ideas sprouting in the mind,
     Along with experiences combined
A rich language and reader's words of praise,
     What more is required for a writer to raise!

In my journey as a writer
       I have managed to come so far
Continued support from you, my dear reader
       raises my hope to shoot for the star

                                               - shining_polestar

title: Death Wish ✓
description:
Forever and Always.

❝I may not be your first love, first kiss, first sight, or first date but I want to be your last everything.❞ 
 

Roux Addington is a recognized and successful billionaire in London. He has everything a man could wish for; the looks, the fame, a perfect family and the money which could get him whatever he needed with a snap of his fingers. But Roux Addington doesn't have one thing- a heart donor for his dying wife.

Thea Addington is a stunning young adult. She is power craving and she has known Roux Addington since forever and she trusts him, but Thea Addington doesn't trust one thing- her ability to survive her heart valve disease so she goes searching in Ivory, a small cafè in the rural part of London and there, someone catches her eye to be her replacement- a young pōpolo woman by the name; Raina McCoy.

Raina McCoy is a selfless young woman. Having survived her past back at New Jersey, she starts afresh over in London where she has to struggle to keep a roof over her head and food in her belly. Raina is a humble woman who gives to others even if she doesn't have much to give. She took note of the lanky and pale woman who started coming to the café daily and always gave her extra tips but what this woman actually wanted from her was something she would have never dreamt of being asked of- A dying wish which states that Raina McCoy and Roux Addington are to be married for the sake of her children.

Will love ever blossom in the relationship between Raina McCoy and Roux Addington or would their marriage be nothing but a contract?

Welcome to Sir Rob's Castle!
Before any of you start wondering whether you've landed on an aristocrat's profile - not really. Sir Rob is just a nickname given to me by my inventive readers because of my passion for writing historical stories (featuring feisty ladies, fearless knights, adventure, romance and a healthy dose of humor!)

In real life I'm not a brave knight, but a humble aspiring author and historian from the sunny South of Germany, where I live among the cows, spaetzels and swabians. Despite not being a native English speaker, I try to write English stories because I simply LOVE the language. I appreciate any feedback, since I'm trying to improve! :-)

The funny brown thing on my profile picture is a helmet I wear 24/7, not because I'm a cycling enthusiast, but to protect my literary skull in which a rather important bone has been missing from birth :-)

title: Be with you Never✅
description:
A Taekook short story about one-sided love.

Taehyung loved Jungkook quietly, his feelings tucked away in the spaces between smiles and fleeting glances. Every laugh, every shared moment felt like a small treasure he could keep close, even if it was never really his. He knew the truth-that Jungkook's heart already belonged to someone else. And still, he found himself lingering, catching his breath every time Jungkook looked his way, even though he knew those eyes would never truly see him. It was a bittersweet ache, loving someone who would never love him back, but Taehyung couldn't let go. Loving Jungkook, even from a distance, was all he had.

title: Lip Lock Jinx (dramione)
description:
A new popular jinx has been created, which gives Ginny, Blaise, Pansy and Theo, a new idea for a prank on their weekly pranking day, which commences every Friday. 

The group try and get Hermione and Draco to join them, but it's always a no.

They prank people as normal, and try the new jinx on the next person that walks by, which just so happens to be Draco Malfoy, engrossed in his book.

 When Draco is placed under this jinx, or more like a curse, in order to become free from it, he has to kiss the love of his life. The only problem was that the love of his life was Hermione Granger.

title: Against the Odds - Tom Riddle x Reader
description:
In a world where power and reputation dictate every decision, Y/N finds herself trapped in an arranged engagement to the overbearing and controlling Dean Blackwood. Meanwhile, Tom Riddle, the enigmatic son of a powerful family, faces his own struggles with an arranged match to a woman who fails to stir his ambition or intrigue.

When their paths cross at a grand winter ball, a single dance changes everything. Drawn together by shared dissatisfaction with their fates and an undeniable connection, Y/N and Tom must navigate the complexities of duty, desire, and the expectations of their families.

As tensions rise and secrets unravel, they'll have to make a choice: follow the paths set before them or risk everything to carve out their own destiny-together. 

This is a short story.

This story is a work of fan fiction. Aside from any existing dialogue or plot elements from the original source material, the plot, dialogue, and all original characters are my own creation. 👉🏻 Declared Second Runner-Up (Adore) in IPK-CHARM-AWARDS 2018 👈🏻

    ♥️♥️ This is an Arshi Fanfiction. ♥️♥️
  For those who are new to the couple, Arnav and Khushi, who are infamously called as 'ArShi' by all their ardent lovers, are the protagonists of an Indian Television Drama series named 'Iss Pyaar Ko Kya Naam Doon?' (What shall I name this Love?)
      
      :::::::::::
      
      Arnav blissfully content in his supposedly happy married life with the love of his life, Khushi, returns back from his business trip to London hoping to cradle his wife in his arms and enjoy the moments of pleasure which he can only spend with his wife. 
      
      But what he was met with when he reached his home to his wife is something he never thought can be possible. With the new revelations (are they?) along with the presence of his two timer Brother-in-law, who he chucked out not too gracefully from his house, now sitting amidst his family and another unwanted guest in the Raizada Mansion, whom does Arnav decide between? His wife or his family and sister?
      
      To know more.. peep in!! :)
      
      :::::::::::

title: Fighting in the Shadows
description:
-COMPLETED-

Seventeen-year-old Violet Lockwood has always been a rule breaker. 
But when her parents both pass away, now she is in charge of her twelve-year-old sister Kylie. Violet decides to move to a sleepy town in Pennsylvania in order to protect her and her sister. 
Violet's expertise is in fighting, and the only way for her to earn money is to participate in underground street fights.  Trying to escape child services, and trying to help her sister live a normal childhood, Violet is in for a bigger challenge then she expected. 

What lies in store for Violet in her new home? And what happens when she enrolls in the local high school?

WARNING: Strong language and some
 steamy scenes!

title: You Belong With Me || Yang Jungwon [✔️]
description:
This is a story of Two Best Friends, Yang Jungwon and Kang Jia wherein they need to get married to each other for the sake of their family's happiness... 

But the thing is Jungwon likes someone else who is not Jia, How can he marry someone else if his heart don't belong to the person who he is going to marry ??

A glimpse of the Story :

❝ Then why did you care ? Whenever I was scratching my wound, you were always there. The way you listened to me for hours like a butterfly is chasing a flower. You made me so comfortable around yourself and said that you know me more than I know myself. I don't know if this is not love then what is... But I will wait for you beyond my limits ! ❞  Yang Jungwon said in a defeated tone, while hot tears streamed down from his almond-shaped eyes.


                                                                      ..••°°°°••..


Tears rolled down on Kang Jia's soft cheeks, gazing at Jungwon. Asking the universe, what went wrong ? They were so happy with each other.   The female trying to mend her broken heart which is hurting because of the said Man.


                                                                      ..••°°°°••..


❝ No, I don't love you. Yet, I yearn for one look at your face. I hide my tears when I hear your name. I want to make it work so bad even when it hurts. I feel like I lose my home when the thought of losing you triggers me. I could go on and on but of course I don't love you. ❞ Kang Jia let out ironically while gazing at the man, she loves more than anything for a long time.


                                                                       ..••°°°°••..


Two hearts mourning for each other, Will they be able to mend their broken heart again ?? 


This is my Original work, The Characters displayed in this story are fictional. The Characters played by the Idols don't have anything to do with their real self.

title: She's Cowardly and Sweet
description:
[STORY NOT MINE. FOR OFFLINE READING PURPOSES ONLY.]

Author: Yuezhaoxi
Year: 2018

Xiang Wanwan is a little cowardly and soft. However, it doesn't matter. Although she is cowardly, she has money!

She felt that raising Lu Ziqian was probably the most extraordinary thing she has ever done in her life - it took all the courage she had in her whole life.

Lu Ziqian felt very strange. In front of him, the little girl's height only reached his chest. Where did she get the courage to say that she wanted to take care of a CEO?

title: Mad At Disney ⚊ Enhypen Jungwon Text AU [ #4 ]
description:
"What the actual hell? Are you a recruiter of Disney?"

"Dude, seriously? Who wouldn't love Disney? It's the most magical place in the whole world"

"Have you ever been there in the first place?"

"Well, no"

"Then go away and sing all your woes away like those Princesses who thinks singing to birds and mice will make everything go away"

"You remind me of the grumpy dwarf in Snow White. Are you small too?"

"Don't talk about my height!"

☏ ⚊ ☏

Once upon a time in a far far away land, but not really, but in city of Seoul, a die hard Disney fangirl who's aiming to be a theater singer in order to go at her dream world called the idol she met in a fansign..

Only to end up ringing the number of the cynical and sarcastic leader of Enhypen, Yang Jungwon.

title: Office Discipline
description:
I give specific instructions and expect my staff to obey them. The only way for my company to remain successful is if I have employees who work well and perform their tasks as directed.

However, my secretary, Bella, manages to mess things up time after time. I have finally decided to end it and give her the punishment she deserves. Maybe after a little discipline she will learn to do things the correct way.

But, maybe, she may choose to continue to disobey when she realizes the kind of punishment I have in store.


(Office Discipline is a short 1,300 word story -- a scene, more like - and is meant for a brief reading pleasure.)
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Ashlee Shades is a Contemporary Romance author who enjoys writing sensual and hot romance stories featuring alpha bad boys (who doesn't love a bad boy taking control?), role play scenarios, and revenge.

Ashlee enjoys spending her days either reading when she's not writing...or hanging out on social media. What an addiction, right?! Her reading and writing genre of choice is steamy romance. Who wouldn't love to escape reality within the pages of a romance book that has a touch of spice?

title: Us? Together?
description:
He was hot; standing at about 6'3, lean, wide strong shoulders, definitely had a eight pack, and biceps that flexed with his every movement. His beautiful blue eyes made every girl faint with one look. One of his eyebrows pierced with a black ring and a lip ring hung from the corner of his mouth. He was every girl's dream at Caldwell Highschool..... Well almost every girl...

She was sexy; standing at about 5'9 and the legs of an angel. Her body displayed the most perfect curves that would put a pornstar to shame. Her eyes were dangerous, voice was smooth as melted chocolate and attitude that would make that devil cry in the corner for his mother. Every guy in Caldwell Highschool wanted her- BADLY...... 

So we have these two badass teens in one school..... What's gonna happen? Read to find out.....
----------------------------------------------

title: A Very Yeet Christmas
description:
When professional wrestler Jey Uso, known for his high-flying moves and powerful presence in the ring, finds himself seated next to a single mother and her two children on a long flight, he never expects the journey to change his life. The mother, Toya, and her kids, Jayson, a 14-year-old wrestling fan, and Taaliyah, a curious 7-year-old, quickly recognize him, sparking conversations about his career, his tattoos, and his life as a wrestler. In a moment of kindness, Jey gives Jayson an action figure of himself, making the boy's day. But as the flight comes to an end, Jayson quietly wishes for something deeper-a wish for a father figure in his life.

On Christmas morning, Jey's unexpected holiday magic comes to life when his action figure mysteriously comes to life and appears in Jayson's living room. What begins as a chance meeting on a plane turns into a life-changing moment of Christmas magic, offering Jayson a bond he never thought possible, and the family an unexpected connection that brings hope and warmth into their lives.

The moment, it felt so serene. I was at peace. Giddy even. This was the right thing. I was in the right place with the right person. No regrets, no what if's, no pain. Just peace, love and comfort..

"I do." 


.... But nothing is ever so perfect.

Journey with Jasarie as she walks along the edge of her life. Will she make it or will the stresses of life give way beneath her feet.

title: You're the best, Secretary Andrew! (MxM)
description:
From hating his boss to fake dating him. What could go wrong?
      
Secretary Andrew is the perfect secretary. Intelligent, resourceful, and beloved by the employees. While his boss, Sir Allen-the CEO's son, is cold, anti-social, and has the emotional capacity of a potato.  Until one night, Allen offered Andrew the deal of his life: 

Pretend to be his trashy boyfriend in exchange for a filthy sum of money.  He just needed to act stupid, slutty, and an overall disappointment. Just enough for Allen's family to disown him.
      
Andrew wants the money, so he can finally leave his boss.
Allen wants to be the black sheep, so he can leave his family's business.
    
The line between boss and employee blurs as they close the distance to prepare for a barrage of explosive family dinners, aggressive socialites, fake romantic dates, and complex caught-in-the-act situations.
    
Will they both get what they want?

authorBio:
Hi, everyone!

Thank you for taking the time to check out my Wattpad account. My name is Gyana, and I am currently a college student who found their way back to writing and Wattpad. I've had my account for quite some time, but recently returned from a four-year hiatus. For all the new followers and long-lasting members of the cereal army (the name for my fan-base), thank you so much for continuing to support me even while I was gone for so long. I am so happy to be back!

To know more about me: I joined Wattpad when I wasn't too great of a writer. I was also very young and rushed through most of these stories, so I'm surprised that Anger Management is so loved and is on the road to two million reads. I'm sorry to everyone who has been waiting for an update for Sage & Vera, Listen, Addiction, and The Girl Who Brought Down Rion. I'm going to think of a plan for me to follow since I've been away for so long, and resume updating or even start over once again after rethinking the entire plot for these stories. Bear with me, lovelies!

While I was gone, I have had so many ideas for stories that I think I'll share in this platform, and hope you all will be excited to read it! I'm also very friendly and will try to respond to all who messages me. You can use Conversations or my private message, and I'll get back to you as soon as I can.

Again, thank you all so much for all the love and support. I'm blown away from the accomplishments I've made while I was gone, and I hope you can forgive me for being gone for so long.

Welcome to the Cereal Army, and thank you for staying.

title: Don't Call Me Baby
description:
Jordy feels like she has met the love of her life and everything is almost as if taken out of a fairytale, especially after Archer Finn confronts her about his own feelings for her. 

The only obstacle for a beautiful relationship to bloom is the fact that Jordy has to leave for university in exactly seven days. Oh, and the fact that Archer is notorious for his player tendencies and cannot be trusted.

Can she wear her heart on her sleeve even if it's only for a week?
-----
"You've had sex in a car, haven't you?" 
"I've had sex pretty much everywhere, baby." 
"Ew, gross." 
"Why do you think so? Actually doing it in the park isn't-"
"I wasn't talking about this, I just really hate pet names. I cringe so hard every time a couple overuses a certain word, thinking it's romantic. It's not! Why is this even a thing?" 
"Wow, I never thought someone could be this cute while pulling a mom rant."
"Shut up." I scrunch up my nose as if I'm offended but my cheeks redden nonetheless. 
"Okay, baby."
-----
PG13: curse words, sexual jokes and innuendos, descriptive kissing scenes
This book is planned to be short, sweet and easy to read!  I dedicate it to all of my hopeless romantics out there :)

title: Spellbound
description:
Lera Thatcher. She doesn't usually fall for people. She's a daydreamer, and loves to find the best in every situation.

Christian Laurence. He's irrational, impulsive and a friend of Lera's older brother. 

He's been hanging around for years, becoming more infuriating by the second. He's always teased Lera, and she hates him for it. So when their families decide to stay at a beach house together over the summer, why does he take a sudden interest in her? And why, as hard as she tries to fights it, can she feel a magnetic pull towards him? Is it just close proximity, or are under each others spell?

With their years of history, are they set for an implosion? Or is there room for an alternate ending?

~ The First Story in the 'Endlessly' Series ~

title: Tempting Daddy: A Forbidden Romance
description:
Forgive me Father for I have sinned.
Again. 
I told myself I could fight the temptation.
That was a lie.
I tried dousing my body in holy water.
But... Satan set me on fire once again.
You see I've got a problem. 
A big one.
I've locked the forbidden fruit up in my closet.
That doesn't stop me from wanting her.
Thinking about how sweet she tastes.
This isn't a confession.
This is me telling you I'm throwing in the towel.
It's over. 
He's won. 
Satan's alive and he's hungry.
Hungry for the one woman I've lusted over for five years.

title: New Beginning
description:
My heart hammered against my chest as I walked up the steps to the house.
  
       He's going to hate me...maybe he'll just say he's done with me. 
  
  No, shut up Winter. Take a breath. Knocking on the door, I prayed he wasn't home. God how do I start?!
  
        Hey Sir, I'm sorry I left you in the middle of-
  
   My thought was interrupted when the door was opened and his cologne hit me. I looked at my hands knowing what has going to happen next. The breeze sent shivers down my spine, or was that the look he was giving me?
  
        "Mr.Kormack, I'm sorry-" I began but when he pulled me into the house and slammed the door, pressing me against it. His lips found my neck, sucking. I let out a moan instead. A smirk was on his lips.
  
  "Princess you left me in the middle of a crowd with no mate. I was embarrassed. You were very bad-naughty." He growled making me swallow hard and grip what material I could. 
  
        "S-Sir I-" He growled and I stopped.
  
  "What happens to bad girls, Princess?" He asked kissing up my neck.
  
        "They get punished." I whimpered and he moved me so I faced the stairs. He slapped my ass hard, making a gasp and whimper come from my mouth. 
  
  "That's not even the beginning. Now go wait." He growled with a smirk.
  
  ________________________________________________________________
  
 This is a werewolf book with more than just this relationship. It does get intense, so it may not be for everyone. I'm trying to finish it up for everyone.  I hope you enjoy, let me know what you think :)
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Writing is my way of expression. It's what I'm able to use so others can understand what I have floating in my mind constantly. It's fluid and I can easily articulate what I'm saying.

I'm a compassionate and fun kind of gal who isn't afraid to have a controversial discussion.

I enjoy learning about lives, personal stories, and others. It allows me a more diverse comprehension of life and what is out there.

title: Their Goddess - The Roses, Book 3 (Completed)
description:
Completed
The Rose Triplets.....
Elijah
Noah
Jericho
Their Goddess....
Genevieve Thorn
At Sixteen the boys had teased, tormented and pranked her and made her life vividly colourful.
At Eighteen she had turned the tables tormenting them with her every move, till she had run from them.
At Twenty she returned to finish her final year at university and  to build  a career in wildlife photography. They warned her they were waiting.
At Twenty One, with university done,  her time was up......

authorBio:
To everyone reading my stories, thank you.

These stories are my own, some are clichés, some stories may resemble bits from others but these are my own work, but as I read too many books I know those stories could bleed ideas into mine.

I like my heroes tall and my heroines short and curvy, there's something about a protective male wrapped around a petite female that is just right for me.

I like short story's that I can read in my lunch break or another small pocket of time, so that's what I write.  Also these are all works of FICTON so if I get a Gods history wrong, I'm not worried so neither should you be.

Thank  you to those who leave comments and are following me, it means a lot to know you enjoy my stories. 

Please don't copy but take ideas and make them yours if you want to.

title: The Villain Kidnapped Me (Hiatus)
description:
I was transmigrated inside a book. I am a character that was not mentioned even in a single, measly line, the existence of my character was worse than a supporting character or a villainess. I didn't have any information about it. But it didn't really matter, since I don't really care.

The point here is that I am not even a significant character yet the villain kidnapped me! You're supposed to kidnap the heroine! He's not even acknowledging that he kidnapped the wrong person! 

"I'm telling you that you kidnapped the wrong person!"

"Scram. This is the only way I can get even with him. Aren't you tired of lying at this point?"

How petty! Have a duel or competition with the male lead instead of kidnapping a person!

"I already told you months ago. You really got the wrong person!"

"I see. But you can't do anything about it anymore. Stay here. We're accomplices now."

What the hell?!
Tous Droits Réservés

title: sukoon.
description:
Loving someone is as beautiful as the sunset but letting them go is as wonderful as the sky after sunset and the night awaiting.

"Kabhi pyaar bhi kiya tha mujhse?" He asked, his voice cold, rough and husky. 

"Mera jawab shayad mayne nahi rakhta ab," She replied, looking everywhere but him and that's his punishment for loving her. 

"Ab to kuch bhi mayne nahi rakhta," He replied, looking everywhere but her and that's her punishment for loving him. 

"Maaf kar paoge mujhe?" She asked, trying to hold his hands,

"Kaha na, kuch mayne nahi rkhata hai ab," He replied, harshly jerking off her hands. 

"Hum mayne rakhte hai?" 

"Hum nahi sirf 'main' aur 'tum'." 

"Phir kabhi 'hum' ho payenge?" 

"Kash na hi ho." 

"Kyun?" 

"Kyuki ye sawal main phir kabhi puchna nahi chahta." 

"Kya?"

"Kabhi pyaar bhi kiya tha mujhse?"

title: Hollow Dream
description:
Love. Love can be so lame sometimes. Love can be what you desire the most. She claimed a love that never could be hers, and even in her deep dreams, her love was still chaotic. She dreamt of a life that could never be hers and had illusions of the ones she could never have; she feared the loneliness, but it eventually caught up to her; she wanted love so desperately, more from her parents, but recklessly it came up not to her; the twisted lies and reality had found her and dragged her to the aimless situation. She tried so hard to fight back; even in her dreams she knew she couldn't escape; she saw the one she loves fly away, and then she knew as well that was her sorrow.

title: To The Moon And Baks
description:
"And sometimes I have kept my feelings to myself, because I could find no language to describe them in."


───────────────────────


 "I like you back, Solace." 




Nagdulot iyon ng pamilyar na sensasyon sa katawan niya pati na rin ng pagkapawi sa kanyang lungkot at pagdududa. Nothing can describe the state of happiness she's currently in right now. Makikita naman talaga ang pagkadalisay sa mukha at tono ni Xially, sa katunayan ay dapat hindi niya na ito pinagdudahan pa noong simula pa lang.




Ibigsabihin, tama pala ang pag-aasume niya? Shet, may maganda rin naman palang naidudulot ang pagiging tanga minsan.




Subalit hindi niya maiwasang mapatanong, "So... Ano nang mangyayari sa atin?" Mayroong nabanggit na panliligaw si Xially kanina kaya abot langit ang kilig at ngiti niya ngayon. "L-liligawan mo ako?" Napakamot siya sa kanyang batok at nahihiyang nginitian si Xially.




Umangat ang isang kilay ni Xially habang pinipigilan ang tawa. "Ha?" Bakit ba iniisip ng lahat na siya ang manliligaw? Like, haller? Mas babae pa nga siya kay Solace, eh!




Once again, confusion invaded Solace's wholebeing, causing her to pull away from the everlasting hug. Kalilinis niya lang ng tenga, imposibleng namali siya ng rinig kanina-na liligawan daw siya nito kung komportable siya. But now that she's stating that she's fine with it, why is he suddenly acting this way?




However, truth to be told, did Xially ever mention that he will be the suitor? 




"Girl, ikaw ang manliligaw sa akin!" Maharot niyang ani at muling kinikilig na hinawakan ang mga kamay ni Solace.




Puta?



───────────────────────


To The Moon and Baks, writtenbyxejiii


───────────────────────

title: Blood Rose (Completed)
description:
27 years of slumber is a long time. 


The Losers Club think they defeated Pennywise after the clown has put them through a grinder of fear and horror.

Years go by and the Losers club drift apart while thinking Pennywise is dead.  Most of them move out of Derry. Their memories slowly fade and they forget they faced IT when they were children.

What if Pennywise never went to sleep?
That he loses most of his powers for 27 years and needs to take on his human form of Robert Gray, cursed to roam around Derry? 

He would be bored as hell. 

Until he finds someone special to toy with to keep him busy until he gets his powers back.

//I'm not a horror writer. Neither do I write loads of violence in my stories. I would like to give horror a try. Just in case, each chapter will contain a proper trigger warning when needed.//

title: torn hose: a mother's story
description:
Hi, my name is Lori, and I'm a thirty-six-year-old mother of two teenagers. 
I was married when they were both born, but unfortunately, ours has been a one parent household for the past eight years. My husband died and I haven't remarried. 
My oldest is Rachel, my seventeen-year-old daughter. 
The younger is my fifteen-year-old son Raymond . . .

At one point I discovered Raymond had been sneaking around and trying on mine and my daughters clothes.



This is my story of how I dealt with this.

*This story was written by Sabrynabrooklynne on Wattpad. If you aren't reading it there, it's been stolen. Please report the website. It's probably not the final version either.*
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
A mildly popular Wattpad writer, Sabrynabrooklynne puts her heart and soul into her writing. Once you take the plunge into one of her books, you'll  finish it and  want to read another.
You'll find she likes to intertwine her stories, setting several of them in the same area and time frame, causing events and characters to overlap.  It's a unique approach that has the potential to surprise and delight.

You won't be disappointed.

                              - Laindzy

===========

Welcome friends and stalkers. Be sure to leave comments on my stories as you read them. I truly want to know what you think.

Spent 7 years in South Korea and I still can't understand too many words in Korean beyond hello, thank you, you're welcome, and the names of a ton of foods, but I don't care, I LOVED Korea and can't wait to return someday!

You know what bugs me? --ghost readers. You never know what they thought of your work. You can only assume they hated it.

Favorite Food: DeepHouse and k-pop
Favorite Color: 17
Favorite Number: July
Favorite Month: Pizza
Favorite Music: Purple
Favorite Story On Wattpad: A Cinderella Story the IV by @lexbugplus5

I love to joke and have a good time

I Love reading well written stories.


After reading my story, if you think you could make a better cover than the one I currently have, make it and send me a link. I'll let you know what I think and I may just use it.

I ❤️ reading comments. Good or bad, tell me what you think and please, please give me suggestions to improve my stories, as well as point out errors I may have missed so I can fix them.
Newlywed, so I won't be updating as often as before (you can blame my nypho husband)

title: After Dark (SasuNaru story)
description:
Naruto finally sucked up to modern day technology and got himself a phone. Weird devise that you can use your fingers to touch a screen-like thing, to send messages to people. There's plenty of other things you can do on it but that's beyond Naruto's comprehension. 

Most of his friends have them and even the kids now a days. His own son even has one.

This story takes a turn but not for the worst.
He starts to get messages from an unknown number. In attempts to finding out who it is, he begins to catch a feeling. One he doesn't himself quite understand. But what he does know this person knows him, and knows him well.
When he does discover who it is, it's up to him to decide what happens next. 


I must say this is by far my best story so far. 


~~Thanks for reading! In advance!! I have to give a background do this story so it's not just strictly texts. This is a SasuNaru story which means it's Fanfiction. I've wanted to do a texting story for a while and i just recently read someone's which gave me this idea. Credits to the original writer @glitterandshine12 (still waiting for the next part of your story!) 

Warning BOYxBOY 

I do NOT own any Naruto pictures in this or anything to Do with Naruto. Masashi Kishimoto is the creator.

title: Her, To Home
description:
He didn't stop when he reached her but leaned forward and kissed her hard, on the mouth. The air left her lungs. Maybe it was because it was her first kiss or because he had kissed her, she didn't know but her lungs were burning, her lips were on fire. She was one fire. It ended in a second. She stared at him with wide eyes as he stared back. His hand traced her forehead, nose, lips and then chin as it stopped on her throat. She knew, by God she knew he could feel her pulse, the heat on her cheeks. 
"I'm home." 


Dean Woodland left two years ago without a word or sound and now he is back to bring his belongings with him.

title: Help Line
description:
In which a girl calls a help line and meets a boy on the other end who's willing to do anything to save her before she hits rock bottom.

༻❁༺

"Sorry. I shouldn't be calling you at such a late hour. I just..."

"Needed someone to listen? Go ahead, love. Speak what's on your mind. I'll be here to listen to you."

༻❁༺

HR: #1 in hotline
        #1 in free mental illness
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
❝I walk around like everything is fine, but deep down, inside my shoe, my sock is sliding off.❞

Kayla is a high school girl who constantly promises herself every year that she will stop procrastinating, but she constantly breaks that promise every year.

She's half Asian, but not Chinese because Chinese people are not the only Asians out there. Instead, she's half Korean (South Korean, not North Korean, if you were going to ask like countless other people do) yet she can not speak Korean because she was born and raised in America. She doesn't listen to K-Pop, but likes to listen to music by Billie Eilish.

Unlike what you would expect from an Asian, Kayla is horrible at math and despises it, her skin is not yellow (what is she, a minion?), and her eyes do not become nonexistent every time she smiles and laughs.

Instead of socializing with kids her age, Kayla prefers to hole herself up in her room and read books. As a consequence of reading so much, her standards for boys has risen to an impossible level, basically leaving her single for the rest of her life. She's shy around strangers but opens up and acts like a person who escaped from a mental asylum around friends, possibly making them regret ever befriending her.

To adults, she seems like a pious angel. However, if they took a step into her mind they would probably  faint in shock due to how dirty her mind truly is.

She also really enjoys writing and experimenting with story ideas. Her works have ranked, and she would really appreciate it if you checked them out :)

title: What if Sita never left for the forest with Ram?
description:
Ramayan: AU

No this is not about Sita's second exile.

Presenting,  "A Bombshell Turn: Test of Faith".

The Ramayana has been a tale of duty, sacrifice, and unwavering resolve. But what if Sita had never left for the forest with Ram? How would the epic unfold? Prepare for a journey through an alternative timeline, where every choice and consequence leads to a riveting test of faith.

"A Bombshell Turn: Test of Faith" reveals that the true strength of the Ramayan lies not in the separation of its characters, but in their unity, their unwavering faith in one another, and the love that bound them through every trial.

title: Requited Love
description:
🖤 ᵣₑqᵤᵢₜₑd ₗₒᵥₑ 🖤

٩(●˙▿˙●)۶...⋆ฺ     

"You are such a tease aryan" she said opening the door of driver seat for herself.

"Just for you baby.." he replied grinning.

"What...if..I..I asked you...why you calls me with such nickname" she asked, turning back and looking at him...as she got something to talk.

"Wanna know why?..." he asked getting close to her lips.

He closed the distance between them by keeping his hands on either sides of her waist and caged her in between him and car.

Her back touching the car making her hard to breathe because of their proximity.

She didn't replied to it by anything and looked down, biting her lips..

[Agh...please don't make it hard of me preet...I don't want to loose my control on you] he thought to himself 

"Don't..." he said loosing his control.

 She raised her eyebrow in confusion.

He moved his hand close to her lower lip and pulled it out from her teeth.

She started burning because of his action and he started loosing his calm seeing his affect on her.

He rubbed his thumb lightly on her lower lip...feeling all attracted towards her... she looked at him with wide eyes and crimson cheeks.

"if you want to see a different aryan then you can continue with your work.." he said desire visible in his tone...❤️‍🔥

☆*:.｡.o(≧▽≦)o.｡.:*☆

Join Preeti and Aryan in their journey of requited love...

(*˘︶˘*).｡.:*♡

Holly Lee is a Christmas lover. She adores everything about it. The twinkling lights making her heart beat with excitement. The beautiful time spent with her loved ones. The crunchy, sparkling snow under her feet.

Max Verstappen is a Christmas hater. He despises everything about it. The ugly lights making his head ache. The stupid chase after materialistic things. The disgusting snow soaking his new shoes.

One coincidence forces these two opposites to meet.

Or is it a Christmas miracle?

title: Healer
description:
Molly Elisabeth Winter is a twenty year old woman she is also a wolf,living in a small cabin alone within the white moon pack. She lost her parents two years ago when there was a rogue attack. Never popular in the pack, but since losing her parents, she has somehow become the pack slave. she cooks, cleans. She is a size twenty, and when others find her repulsive, she finds herself loving her figure. She once asked her alpha if she could leave the pack the answer she got was a no accompanied  by a public beating, the only way  she would get out of this pack is if She finds her mate.





Austin Orton is a feared alpha in the world. He loves to see the fear in their eyes when they see him, he hasn't found his mate yet and he doesn't want to he can run his pack by himself. The only thing he cares about is making his pack stronger and more feared.
Tous Droits Réservés

title: Let her go || Barry Allen
description:
Being in love with Barry Allen is not an easy thing to do. It's nothing about him that's the problem, in fact Cameron Sawyer think he's pretty much perfect. It's the fact that he's in love with someone else. 

Cameron's known Barry for almost 10 years now and for as long as she's known him he's been secretly in love with Iris West and Cammie's been secretly in love with him. 

When the two get into a relationship Cammie decides that for the sake of her heart she has to leave Central City and the love of her life behind. 

But what happens when after letting her go, Barry realizes that she was all he's ever wanted in life?
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio: Hey everyone! My names Breanna and I'm a total Wattpad addict. I love reading all different kinds of stories, especially fan fiction because people get the chance to share their stories and ideas on how shows should go. To all those out there writing their stories on Wattpad, I hope you all know how amazing you are for putting your own work out there for others to read and enjoy!

title: And Then It Rained (Sequel to Rain Again; Stand Alone Book) (Completed)
description:
*Sequel to Rain Again.
*A Wattpad Exclusive.
*With the support from the Wattpad Creators Program
*A Standalone Book
*Cover by Wattpad

~A Past~
Victor and Victoria share a bitter past which makes him loathe her. 

~A Fated Collision~
He was running after a broken wish when she ran into him in her wedding dress with the demons of her life chasing her.

~A Scandal~
Victor is new in the world of business and is carefully building himself in the market. 
Victoria's family is originally from the emerald lands of Goa, India. She is a talented photographer and a traveler by heart. Unfortunately, her father is conservative and dominating to an impossible point. And she wishes to take over the business from him that her late mother had built.
So, a scandal of them ruining Victoria's family reputation is the worst thing that could happen as it made her father go after both of them.
And there is only one way to get out of this mess.

~A Wedding~

*Kate's journey after Rain Again will find its closing alongside.

title: Happily Married To An Asshole
description:
Mirabel Collins a 21 year old girl who lost her mother at a tender age has to live with her father who was busy chasing after lifeless notes and coins and didn t have time to take care of his daughter  and a step mother who treat her like trash because she married him for his money she couldn't give birth and mirabel is the only to her father's wealth 


Xavier Parker 24 year old multi billionaire who could have every thing he wants with a blink of an eye a man who thinks everything must go his way even a blind man can feel his arrogance after his family the next thing is wealth 

...........................................................

Follow the story of how two different world collided 
What happens when mirabel is forced into a marriage with a person she knows nothing about will mirabel finally find the love she has been longing for after her mother died 
will xavierbe able too give her the love and respect she deserve or will he be a jerk 

   That's all I know for now but you can find out by reading this story will ya? 😎😎

stay connected 😉😉😉
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
I am just a person from the other side of the world. Definitely not a sport lover but that doesn't mean I hate sports.

 A bathroom singer and drawing and designing something as hobby. My likeness for reading and my wild imagination inspired me to write stories already cooked up in my head.

"warning!!!"
what some of you would call' self love' below but others just call it- hmmm what it called again, oh yeah 'self obsession', 'arrogance', 'pride' and what other name.' don't say I  didn't warn you;)


Well if we are gonna talk about me. I like thinking my self as a limited edition snack- rear, irresistible and definitely not for every one. I am fluent in sarcasm, so if I say something nice I probably don't mean it. I am not addicted to reading, I can stop as soon as I finish the next chapter. Have you seen a squirrel crossing the street? My decision making skill resembles it, which cause me to start thinking about what I want to eat for dinner from breakfast. I don't suffer from shyness, I am just holding back my awesomeness so I don't intimidate you. I like my bed more than I like most people. I wake up every morning with the joy and excitement of wanting to go directly back to sleep. People say nothing is impossible but I literally can do nothing all day. I'm so clever some times I don't understand a single word I say.  I'm just a regular normal person. And if you are wondering I'm a Libra♎♎ by sign.


if you're still reading this, you're just as weird so yeah stop with the face ;)

                                                 A Nigerian 🇳🇬🇳🇬 by the way:)

title: The Girl In Room 417
description:
The girl in room four-seventeen seems to be a permanent part of the paediatric wing of St. Anne's Hospital. She is bright, smiley, full of life. She doesn't look sick at all. 

Ben Carlisle becomes a semi-permanent visitor, taking all the time he can to visit his sister, Emily, who has been diagnosed with Leukaemia. Again. The girl in 417 is nothing but a privileged kid with no place else to go. He seems to be the only one who doesn't like her, or her ability to make him think beyond his self-involved mindset. So why is it that he can't seem to stay away from her?
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
I write flawed characters, epic romances and cataclysmic heartache... and drink way too much coffee.

authorBio: Hi thanks for taking the time to read my description, but anyway I am the biggest Descendants fan out there! I love to write and I've been doing it for about 7 years now. I just love Mal and Evie's friendship. Obviously Descendants is my favorite movie, I think the second one is my absolute favorite, I also love the Pirate's of the Caribbean movies, the Avengers, OUAT, and all of Sofia's movies. Please let me know if there are any ideas that you have that you want me to write. And I would really love it if you commented and voted on my stories, they mean so much to me! There's really only a few things I don't write, I don't do smut, I don't write LGBTQ+, and I don't swear in any of my writing, if you don't like these you don't have to read any of my stories. Other than my writing, I am just a regular 19 year old who is obsessed with Sofia Carson! Thanks for taking the time to read this!!!

description:

   "បងជេយ៍!"សុងហ៊ុនហៅជេយ៍ថាបងប្រុសជាលើកដំបូងដោយអៀនៗមាត់
   "នេះយើងមិនបានស្ដាប់ច្រឡំទេមែនទេ?"ជេយ៍ឧទានដោយភ្ញាក់ផ្អើល
   "បងមិនបានស្ដាប់ច្រឡំទេ!បងជេយ៍ឲ្យខ្ញុំសុំទោសបងចំពោះរឿងកន្លង"សុងហ៊ុនតបដោយឱនក្បាលគោរពជេយ៍
   "យើងកំពុងយល់សប្តិមែនទេហា៎យ៉ុនជីន?"ជេយ៍សួរយ៉ុនជីន
   "បងជេយ៍ខ្ញុំ...ខ្ញុំស្រឡាញ់ស៊ុននូ" សុងហ៊ុននិយាយទាំងរដាក់រដុប
   "ហាស៎???"
    វត្តមានរបស់នាយតូចបានកែប្រែជីវិតរបស់ ផាកសុងហ៊ុន180°ធ្វើឲ្យគេចេះស្គាល់អារម្មណ៍អ្វីដែលហៅថាសេចក្ដីស្រឡាញ់ពិតប្រាកដ...ប៉ុន្តែថ្ងៃមួយក៏បានមកដល់ស៊ុននូចាកចេញទៅដោយគ្មានពាក្យលាតើសុងហ៊ុនធ្វើយ៉ាងណា

authorBio:
‼️

I would like to start this off with a disappointing news, I am not back to write new books or to continue writing my on-going books. I came back here as I have decided to revise my old books. This is something I have thought of way back since I was still active here. However, before, I was too busy wanting to write new books that I didn't have time to insert the plan of revising my old books. Even when I took a LONG break, I only had the thought of wanting to revise my old books so bad, but I didn't have time because I was trying to catch up and adjust in college. Though, I'm still going through a lot in college, but the conscience in me has been bugging me to go back and settle my unresolved business. Continuing my on-going book is also an unsettled business, but I personally made a choice to prioritize my old books more.

Regarding the order of books I will make revisions, it's in random order. I will just pick what I feel I want to revise first and next. But rest assured, I will definitely try my very best to rewrite and revise everything. If then, I get my spark back, I'll continue my on-going books.

For now, let's go down to the memory lane together 💗

title: senyuman Terakhir [ C ]
description:
Umar Fayyad ෆ Dara Suffiya 

Sebuah kejadian tragis telah mengubah kehidupan dirinya 360° darjah dulu bahagia kini hanya bertemankan derita . Itu yang perlu dia hadap dari usia kanak-kanak hingga dewasa , Dara Suffiya tiada tempat untuk bergantung mahupun berkasih sayang apabila kedua ibubapa nya melayani dirinya tidak ubah seperti orang luar hanya abang sulungnya sering menjadi tempat dia berkasih sayang. Hidup nya dipenuhi luka dan sengsara akan tetapi Dara redha dengan apa yang terjadi di dalam hidupnya itu . 

Umar Fayyad dengar nama sudah tahu tuan badan seperti mana . Lemah lembut tutur bahasa meskipun agak dingin dia membesar dalam keluarga yang damai dan mementingkan keselesaan. Umar merupakan anak ahli perniagaan yang terkenal hidup nya hanya kerja , kerja dan kerja tiada niat untuk berkahwin hinggalah pertemuan Umar dan Dara terasa sesuatu mengetuk pintu hati Umar Fayyad untuk dekati wanita bernama Dara Suffiya. 

Namun semakin dia mengenali Dara semakin banyak benda Umar tahu tentang gadis itu bagaimana di layan oleh ahli keluarga nya sendiri tetapi dia tidak mengalah demi kebahagiaan gadis itu . Pengenalan secara tidak sengaja membawa mereka ke sebuah perkahwinan yang 'express'! Tanpa perasaan cinta? Namun bagi Fayyad ia boleh di pupuk .

" Jangan risau , aku akan buat kau bahagia sampai akhir hayat. " - Umar Fayyad 

" Terima kasih itu sahaja yang saya mampu ucapkan. " - Dara Suffiya


Disclaimer : 

- only short romance sad story



Jangan lupa untuk vote guys!

title: A Selkie Story
description:
Sam--short for Samantha, if you please--has been living in Crawley, Maine for about a year in her grandfather's lighthouse. A promising advertiser, she works from home and the local coffee shop, where she gets her daily hot chocolate fix. For her, life is perfectly normal and that's just the way she likes it. That is, until she picks up a stranger's coat, and then everything changes.
