Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
'Sup. If you're reading this, you're oddly curious, but whatever. I write because  billions of story ideas float through my head at any given moment, and I need to write them down or they will be lost forever to the recesses of my imagination.

Oddly enough, most of my story ideas come from dreams I've had. So, if a plot seems a bit odd and/or not quite cohesive... I'm still filling in the cracks. Dreams aren't always that comprehensive.

I have TONS of different drafts and ideas half-formed in notebooks and Google docs just waiting for their turn, so be forewarned; I may have multiple stories in the works... eventually.

My dream is to write for a living, but that's still a long ways away.  My goal on this page is to give readers a glimpse into the worlds I've created and love.

I greatly appreciate messages, comments, and votes that you all may give (in no particular order); I would love to hear from you.

title: I Saved The Gangster
description:
Cassidy Morgan, a woman who does not give a damn in the world. She wears clothes that call for no attention. She dyes her hair to mask its true color. She disguises herself to hide from the world. No one knows her name, she's just called, emo. No one knew the reason behind her identitym

What if one day, her own curiosity brings her to a time and place that needs her to choose between two life threatening choices? Leave like she saw nothing at all or wear the heroic cape that little did she know, would turn her life upside down.

Of course, like any fictional character, she chose the latter. Pulling off that heroic act, it changed how her last year in senior high should have ended because she saved the gangster.

---------------------

This book isn't edited so there may be a lot of grammatical errors, I'm sorry. Nonetheless, enjoy my teen fiction book, I promise, it's not your typical cliche one!

title: The Suicide Hotline | ✔︎
description:
"Is this...the...suicide hotline?"

"I...um, yes?"

"...Are you asking or telling?"

"...Telling?"

"What would you do if I told you I wanted to die?"

"I would beg you not to."

"Would you, stranger? Would you really?"

"I would."


Aurora Glass was raised in a sleepy town, completely sheltered from the darker things in life. That's why she doesn't know how to react when she gets a call from a man looking for a suicide hotline. Out of fear he'll actually commit suicide if he doesn't get help immediately, she lies and pretends to be a hotline worker.

Parker Hollowell is on the edge. He's slipping into the void, but unlike some he's aware of it. In a desperate attempt to save his own life, he calls a suicide hotline. The woman on other end sounds very sketchy and suspiciously young. Not that it matters. He's just glad someone pretends to care about his life and his problems.

When a cynical, depressed man unintentionally lets a bubbly, optimistic woman into his life, he has no choice but to bend to her will and see that maybe, there was more to life then he thought.

Copyright @ ItsAllAsh

Started: May 2018
Ended: ???

title: Alpha's Enigmatic Mate
description:
Vincent should have been happy, not just happy but over the moon happy, cause unlike his brother who had to wait years to find his mate, he had found his on his 18th birthday itself. 

He had found her in the woods where he had gone camping with his friends. He should have been happy. So, what if his mate was human, so what if she spoke some alien language, so what if she was yelling and screaming like a lunatic, so what if she was ready to kill anyone who got near her and so what if she was a feisty wild cat. 

He should have been happy. 

But all he was, was utterly confused, wondering what moon goddess thought while giving him this mate. He had a long way to claim his mate, and the start would be to understand what the hell she was speaking.


This is a stand alone book and also continuation of Warrior's Mates.

title: The Bad Boys Badass
description:
"Sorry Mr. Diper." I try saying with a straight face.

"It's Mr. Piper, Kristen how many times do I have to tell you?"

I pretend to think hard.

"How many times have I came to pay you a visit?"

"Too many Kristen, and your not paying me a visit your in trouble."

"Well I don't think I'm in trouble, I got up and told everyone at the table to not touch my food."

He sighed.

"So when Kayden touched my food after I said no, he had to be punished."

"Kristen, you don't punch someone for touching your food." He said with an annoyed tone.
____________________________________

Meet Kristen Peck, total badass, plays basketball and loves her food. Has no parents, left when she was young and only lives with her older brother Chance.

Meet Logan King, the bad boy of the school, plays football the captain of the team actually, parents are rich and has two other siblings and is the oldest.

What happens when Logan returns to high school and right when he walks into the cafeteria, a punch is thrown towards, what looks to be a guy who was joking around. But what happens when he looks to see who threw the punch, what happens when he sees that it was in fact Kristen.

Find out, and follow these two through ups and downs.

DISCLAIMER- The description does not really match the story but does at the same time. (If that makes sense)

title: Mrs. Grinch In Love
description:
Victoria Jones aka Mrs. Grinch hates Winter and the holiday season. Her brother asked her to come to their hometown to meet his fiancée, the same town which she never visited after graduating.

On her way, an unexpected series of events happen to her and her dog, Mini. She meets her first love after nine years and the feelings she had for him blossom again.

Daniel Moore, the total opposite of Victoria loves Christmas and challenges Victoria that he can change her heart.

Will Victoria be able to fight her feelings or fall for the same guy again?

Can Daniel change her heart and bring her holiday spirit back?

*~*~*~*~*

"If you would let me, I can bring that holiday spirit inside you back." He offered.

I frowned and look at him. "What do you mean by that?"

"Spend this Christmas with me and you'll see." He smiled.

Spend an entire Christmas?

With him?

Hell yeah!

"Sure, I'd love to." His grin widened. "But I can't guarantee that it'll work." I grinned.

"Challenge accepted." He smirked.

We stayed like that, looking at each other with stupid smiles on our faces when unexpectedly it felt hot.

Did Mini open a heater or something?

He gazed into my eyes. Suddenly my mouth became dry and I unconsciously licked my lips, which made him look at them. I gulped.

His eyes stayed there and I saw his Adam's apple bobbed. He leaned in, making my breath hitch. My heart throbbed so fast that it might explode any second.

I looked at his lips; they look so soft, pink, and yummy.

He continued leaning his eyes darted between my eyes and lips. When our noses touched, my eyes automatically closed, and I felt his breath on my lips.

Is this happening?

Are we going to kiss?

My dream of marrying him will come true?
 
*~*~*Winterfest 2020*~*~*

HIGHEST RANKINGS:

#1 in Miracles in December 


[Words count: 20,000 - 25,000]
Tous Droits Réservés

title: The Punisher and The Assassin
description:
Alex McKinley, sometimes known as Olivia Anderson (it's complicated) is an ex-SHIELD officer. Instead of retiring her skills, she put them to use and became an assassin. She runs into Frank Castle on a mission one evening. When she returns to New York, she searches for Frank, who's supposedly dead. She helps him finally finish the mission he started. They find that they're much more similar than they're willing to admit. The realization leads to much more violence, cursing and a complicated friendship (if that's what you want to call it). 



*I don't own Marvel's Punisher.

authorBio:
Eleutheromania- an intense and irresistible desire for freedom.

Thank you for reading my stories..if you have. Follow me on Tumblr. And read my stories, I am coming up with some new ones *evil laugh*.

title: Stolen By Him | ✓
description:
In which a girl gets kidnapped by one of the closest friends she's ever had. 

When Lana wakes up with no memory of what happened to her, she discovers that she has been kidnapped. But not only that, it's by the brother of her childhood sweetheart. Stranded in the middle of a forest with nothing but trees, endless hours, and her confusing captor, it's up to her to find a way to escape.

#5 in mystery-thriller (6/07/20)
#19 in shortstory (15/01/2021)

title: With Love, Zayn✅
description:
Copyright 2021© All Rights Reserved.


・ Book Two in the Letters Series・ 








Zayn's entire life revolved around his sister, Kulsum. She was his rock, his guiding light. 

Now, with her gone, a void engulfs him, leaving a part of him missing.

Yet, there is one thing that prevents him from moving forward-a solemn promise.

A promise he made to Kulsum on her deathbed.

A promise that compels him to delve into the depths of his own existence, unearthing secrets he'd rather keep buried. A promise that will strain relationships and cause pain to those involved.

Nevertheless, it is a promise he is determined to honor, regardless of the consequences. 







~*~













By Ferdeausee_
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Forever favorite 🥺❤️👉 @Xaharau 👈❤️🥺



𝔊𝔬 𝔞𝔴𝔞𝔶. ℑ'𝔪 𝔟𝔬𝔯𝔦𝔫𝔤.  



Oh, you're still here? Well, hello there stalker.

I'm bored so I'm finally writing an actual description. And well, here goes nothing.

I'm Firdausi, or Jannah Mia (My full name doesn't matter--or more like I'd like to keep that to myself). You know what? I'm adding my government's name seff, Firdausi Yahya Muhammad. Jannah is a young lady (*Clears throat* who's apparently an 'adult') that has been writing for as long as she could remember (Yes, I'm speaking in third person...sue me). I'm actually an adult now though, surprisingly.

Writing at this moment though is more than a hobby. It's a job (since it brings in za money), a form of therapy, and a way for me to make new friends (don't slide into my dm asking to be friends, such stuff happens naturally). Tbh you're more interested in my books and not me, you know it. Besides, I'm a bad friend so avoid me!

Now here comes the cliché and cringy part: I've been here for a few years and well, Alhamdullilah. Wattpad changed my life for the better. That's all I can say. You know what? It's not so cringy. I sabi write am on my forehead seff.

Hoping to become a published author someday. So, one day you'll read your favorite book and my name will be on the cover in Shaa Allah! This might come sooner than expected so...save your book money.

If you don't hear from me in a while then I'm probably on a hiatus (Or school is showing me hege). So, there's that but I'm mostly active. Update: I've lost interest here so I'm barely active again.

Some of my books are available for purchase on Selar, you can use the Instabio link to get them. Most are here now so enjoy.



Stay safe❤️

Heartstrings_ Jimin and Jungkook , Both loved eachother, they were inseparable but Jungkook broke their promises when he chose his career over Jimin.

He wanted to be a singer, and he asked a break from their relationship when company strictly told him not to have any relationship if he wanted to be a singer .

But he regretted when he left with nothing. Without Jimin he realized that his life was nothing but dead . 

𝐀𝐅𝐓𝐄𝐑 𝐘𝐄𝐀𝐑𝐒; They met again where Jimin run a small cafe with his friend Hobi and Jungkook was a CEO of JJ entertainment Ltd. Who everyday visit the cafe , ofcourse for Jimin and win him back .

And now he wanted him back.

title: Cerita Cinta Nadia
description:
Penulis : Zambri Perasan

Page FB : Dj Zambri 

Nadia. Satu susuk tubuh yang akrab dengan derita dan dugaan. Bergelar yatim piatu pada usia yang muda remaja dan dipinggirkan saudara-mara yang lain, membuatkan dia pasrah digulingkan dengan segala pancaroba dunia. Hanya mampu berpaut pada ihsan keluarga Mak Long, merelakannya menelan segala kepahitan hidup.

Walau hidupnya sengsara, muncul seorang jejaka yang dapat menawan hatinya. Namun sekali lagi dengki dan durjana manusia itu sering mengejarnya. Nadia sekali lagi berjuang mempertahankan haknya.

Sekali lagi, ZP Bercerita, Anda Membaca

title: His Miracle
description:
His Miracle [Previously Known As His Angelic Wife]

Anaika, a plus size woman, is a talk for intelligence, confidence and boldness. When her scandalous family in law tricked her into a marriage with their faint-hearted son, she sets up a mission to save him. But inevitable feelings emerged in between and she fell for him, deeply.

Will he reciprocate her feelings and accept her as his wife, rather than just a saviour?


Started: 24 July 2019
Revised: 19 September 2023

Please do:

title: Trying to Survive Sucks: A Tiana KOTLC adventure.
description:
BOOK ONE
Welcome to the aftermath of Tam's return at the end of Legacy, the eight Keeper of the Lost Cities Book by Shannon Messenger. Narrated by Tam and Biana as they finally form a relationship and are immediately attacked by the Neverseen, who take over the Lost Cities. 
Years pass, and with no one left to stop the Neverseen, Tam, Biana, and their other Elvin friends must find a way to do the impossible.
BOOK TWO INCLUDED
After the aftermath, Tam and Biana have settled down comfortably in the Lost Cities. However, their peace doesn't last long when a war in the human world leaks into their world, leaving them to flee and go into hiding. Eventually, humans will find them, and when they do, will it change the war for better, or for worse?

title: INSHALLAH
description:
A short story. 

Two People. 

Ex-bestfriends. 

One is a doctor, Another is the hospital MD. 

She can't wait to shoot him with words, he can't stop her from doing anything. 

He feels responsible and she's the most irresponsible person you'll find. 

She wants to go away and he'll do everything in his power to keep her close 

He can't look away from her and Well, she can't look away too. 

What happens when time tests them? Make them ache for each other? 

But it's not sparks which flow in air, it's thier words and hidden pain, so how will the journey be. 

let's check it out ourselves.

✿ 

"You got 5 minutes. After that I want you to drop me back home because I'm nowhere near to drive after working 22 hours straight ofcourse as my boss because you can't loose such a good doctor in a car accident, Now can you?" His body stiffened, eyes darkened with anger "I was joking Mady. I really need sleep" she stated sheepishly, muffling a yawn. 

"Okay. I'll do now sit back here" He pointed to the couch and she immediately plopped down again. Eyes closing down with fatigue. "Did you have a proper meal?" he asked picking his received. 

"If you call three bites of a sandwich and eleven cups of coffee a meal then I did have one" she yawned, leaning back against the backrest. 

"You're addicted to caffeine" he mumbled, ordering something for them both in his cabin. 

"Can you stop mumbling under your breath? I'm already trying hard not to dose off here" she said with drooping eyes. 

"You really flip Sana Qureshi, one second you were fighting now you can't sit straight. Will you be normal anytime soon?" He mocked. 

"I'll someday Inshallah" she grinned sleepily. 

He sighed "Inshallah"

authorBio:
hello! i'm blurry, it's very nice to meet you ♡ a few things before you start reading:



» i dont take reading requests. this isn't because i simply don't want to read your wonderful works, it's because i generally am not on here very often and it's been a while since i've sat down and read any fics by anyone.


» it may take me a while to respond to dms so if you've contacted me about translating a book of mine and i haven't added it to my reading list yet, please link me the translated book on my message board.


»  requirements for translating my books!

   ↳ check to make sure the book you want to translate has been completed (completed works of mine have a  ✓  by the title).

   ↳ find my reading list with other translations to see if that book has already been translated (if it has already been translated but the author never finished, you may go ahead and translate it yourself).

   ↳ direct permission to translate a book of mine is not needed. all i require is my account to be tagged, full credit explicitly stated, and for you to link it to me over private messages or on my message board. thank you!



i do hope you enjoy my works. i love you all very much <3

blurryseok signing out . . .

title: I Will Pamper You Forever  |  ABO
description:
Alpha Female X Omega Male

Su Shen is a CEO of Su Company; One of the most well known company to the point that everyone is willing to sell their soul just to work under this company. If the company is famous and sought-after then the CEO is 100x that especially since she's an alpha . Although many omega and beta wanted to marry Su Shen, she would coldly refuse them  indicating that she's not interested in realtionships. Her fans has no choice but to admire her from afar and marrying her would be their impossible dream.

Wen Azumi is a young man struggling to find a suitable job to pay for the hospital expenses of his mother. His dream is to be a photographer but wasn't able to pursue it because he's the only one that his mother relies on. 

-----
Azumi was off to an interview for another job when an alpha's pheromones suddenly burst out and that is when he stumbled upon Su Shen, the person who changed his life.

title: LF Friends, Will Travel
description:
Terrans are not the strongest species in the universe. They are not the fastest species. They are most definitely not the smartest. But Terrans are the loneliest, willing to befriend anything that moves and several things that don't.

After humanity nearly made themselves extinct with a "Terran brand oopsie"™, trillions of Terrans awaken from stasis and set themselves upon a Galaxy teeming with alien life, each writing their own story among the stars. Stories of compassion, of anger, of revenge, of justice. Stories of the clever and stories of the downright stupid.

But mostly the story of Terrans looking for the one thing that all beings desire: Friendship amongst a lonely universe.

title: The Villainess And The Fat King
description:
Seraphina de Valois is the princess of the North.  She had loved once, deeply and fiercely, but her love had been rejected, leaving her with a thirst for power and a desire to manipulate those around her.  She had become a villainess.
 
Her fall from grace came swiftly. Her father, the Duke, was stripped of his title and banished after a betrayal that involved Seraphina herself.   Her punishment?  Marriage to Lord Thorin, the "fat king" who ruled the north.

Despite his power, no one wants to marry him because of his size and ugly face , moreover his icy demeanor.
 
...

"It's a story about a villainess who ends up as the wife of a fat guy, as a punishment."

title: 【On Christmas Night || Jongsang】
description:

☆ - ᴏɴɢᴏɪɴɢ
☆ - ᴅɪsᴄᴏɴᴛɪɴᴜᴇᴅ


A SHORT JONGSANG CHRISTMAS STORY

Christmas night was far more to Yeosang and Jongho then people would take for, yes, it was one of their favorite holidays, but it was more then just festive cheers and jolly celebrations, it was their anniversary of love, a special love, a love they spent all of their lives looking for, but now, 34 years later, at 76 and 74, their days are coming to end, however, awhile enjoying themselves a warm coffe at their local coffee shop, old memories and feelings come back again.

This is recalling of how they meet and fell in love even after their divorces and having children, to find the love they so desired all their life but never knew how to get it until now. 

CHRISTMAS ROMANCE

authorBio:
CHEATING, any type of cheating or betrayal will never be glorified, justified, normalized or excused in my story. Men or Women, I believe we all deserve love, respect and loyalty.

I love having strong Females, who know to say no, who know their boundaries, who can be both nice and wise, and who don't have to forgive an asshole to be a better person, neither do I believe in giving such people another chance to hurt us again.

I also believe in Real Man, and they do exist, just far too lost to be appreciated because of shitty ones spoiling the name of their species.

I believe in KARMA. I believe our wrong choices, and especially hurting someone always come back to us. And I am not a fan of always making Manw***e characters, I do it when I feel fit, but as I said no wrong would ever be supported by me by any means.

I am a person who believes in Being kind not a Fool.
Being strong, not cruel.
Being understanding not a doormat that allows anyone to walk over them.
Last but not least, Know who to Love and Forgive, because some mistakes are unforgivable.

title: Doreamon -- The Last Episode
description:
Do you know Doraemon? yeaah, it's comic character created by Fujiko F. Fujiya , Japan's comic writer.
I watched those episodes since I was 10 years-old.
As you know, Doraemon is a story with no ending, but this small story is about the "last episode" of the famous cartoon.

There are three current and often quoted urban legends that started spreading in late 1980s of an ending to the Doraemon series.
The first and the more optimistic ending was made public by Nobuo Sato several years ago..


Go on and read!
───────────────────────────

title: jeon jeongguk isn't stupid.
description:
jeongguk and taehyung have been bestfriends for ten years. 

it's a long time, in retrospect. in the moment too. jeongguk personally doesn't feel like he knows much, but he knows taehyung. like the back of his own hand.

also like the back of taehyung's hand, that for some reason he can't seem to tear his eyes away from, memorizing long tanned fingers and bright blue veins that trail along to his palms, also draw jeongguk's mind away from reality. from common sense.

a short story about pent up feelings, love, the wrong people and the right ones, and most importantly, taegguk.

also some avatar the last airbender.

title: Taste of Love
description:
#322 in Short Story 20/5/18 
#258 on 22/5/18
#265 on 4/6/18

Vikram walked aimlessly.After missing out chance willingly to.Party with his friends.A day after he canceled his marriage.He was bound to party.For freeing himself.But he was still busy.With one thought.Troubling him.Since he started.Having doubts about.

V-"When I should be happy.Why do I feel so heavy.Restless.
Priyadarshini will get better.Partner."

He played with car keys.Getting inside his car.Soon banging his head.On door.Making a face.He knew what he.Wanted to do.He started car.Going on unpredictable journey.What made him do that.He had to.Look for the girl who was carrying his baby.And he wasn't sure of.Him being father.

Its a short story about two individuals.Having same opinion about life.Vicky and Sirisha are not poles apart.Their story is weird and twisted.How will they get together.Will same likes and dislikes make them.End up together.No.There is twist in their life.Promise this journey to be.Funfilled,weird,happy and emotional.At places.

*The story,characters,contents,places and situations.Mentioned in this book.Are imagination of my mind.Do not take them.In offensive manner.*

authorBio:
My Journey 
                 
When I began I was no writer,
   Appreciation from you, my dear reader
Inspired me to nurture my meager skill,
   And turn writing into a thrill 

Writing for me started as a one-shot,  
  That also meant it would be my last-shot
Words of encouragement made it the first,
  One led to another, and writing became a quest 
   
Mind began to explore,
     Imagination gained wings and began to soar
Ideas sprouting in the mind,
     Along with experiences combined
A rich language and reader's words of praise,
     What more is required for a writer to raise!

In my journey as a writer
       I have managed to come so far
Continued support from you, my dear reader
       raises my hope to shoot for the star

                                               - shining_polestar

title: My Rude And Arrogant Husband : (Xianwang)
description:
Lan Wangji is the son of a rich business man 
Lan Qiren. He's rude, stubborn, arrogant and spoilt brat. His father pampered him a lot since childhood. Now Lan Qiren regrets his decision. He thinks he shouldn't have spoiled Wangji that much.

 Lan Wangji had a bad habit that he despise the poor. He hates poor people. He doesn't have much   friends. 

On the other hand, is Wei Wuxian. He is  kind hearted, honest, and friendly. He has a cheerful nature. He gets along with others quite quickly. He lives with his grandmother. He runs a small hotel.


One day Qiren decides to marry off Wangji to Wei ying but Wangji clearly refuse.



What will happen next? Will the hatred Wangji has for poor people ever end?

Stay tuned.....



Top : Wei ying
Bottom : Lan Wangji





Start : 19 march
End : 24 march



Covee picture by @Zhou_Zhishu76

title: BitterSweet
description:
Aurelia moves in at 15 with her new found family after being apart for 14 years with no memories of them. She grew up in an abusive household so what does she know of what's 
normal and what is not? Aurelia has decided to keep her past a secret, after all they are practically strangers. But what she doesn't know is that her new found family also has a dark unlawful secret. With these circumstances, conflict is inevitable and it sure will be nasty.

title: Sister's Revenge (Completed)
description:
FOR THIRTEEN YEARS, ANDREA HAS BEEN CHAINED BY THE HATRED, PAIN, AND WRATH OF THE PAST THAT HAUNT HER WHEN HER SISTER DIED. 

SHE BLAMES ONLY ONE PERSON SHE NEVER MEET BEFORE. SAMUEL AUGUSTINE. 

BUT EVERYTHING TURNS OUT WRONG WHEN SHE MEET HIM IN A VERY UNEXPECTED WAY. 

WILL HATRED BE A BARRIER?
OR LOVE WILL PREVAIL? 

 *****
I can live my life, knowing that you're mad at me. 
But I can't live my life. Knowing that you left to forget me forever.

authorBio:
My Journey 
                 
When I began I was no writer,
   Appreciation from you, my dear reader
Inspired me to nurture my meager skill,
   And turn writing into a thrill 

Writing for me started as a one-shot,  
  That also meant it would be my last-shot
Words of encouragement made it the first,
  One led to another, and writing became a quest 
   
Mind began to explore,
     Imagination gained wings and began to soar
Ideas sprouting in the mind,
     Along with experiences combined
A rich language and reader's words of praise,
     What more is required for a writer to raise!

In my journey as a writer
       I have managed to come so far
Continued support from you, my dear reader
       raises my hope to shoot for the star

                                               - shining_polestar

authorBio:
First and foremost, @Ooorah is home to TEVUN-KRUS, @Wattpad's #1 and longest-running WattZine (psst -- a WattZine is an ezine on Wattpad)!

Over the last ten years or so, our multinational crew has managed to astro-weld over 100 issues of Tevun-Krus together. Over 100 issues! Wow!

We're now into our second year of Tevun-Krus, Vol. 2, where countless other deep-space journeys await us.

Beyond Tevun-Krus (or TK, as we like to call it), @Ooorah is the place for science fiction here on Wattpad. Whether you're a newbie fresh out of Martian History 101, or a seasoned veteran with many a trip to the asteroid belt under your, uh, belt, you will find a place here among us. Read or write for Tevun-Krus each month, participate in our groundbreaking SmackDown writing contests, or contribute to a sci-fi anthology - we want you on our ship!

Want to write for us? Check out the Watt's Next! chapter near the end of the latest Tevun-Krus issue. All the details are there. Or just email us at wpOoorah@gmail.com

But what's a captain without a crew? Join the gang that makes @Ooorah mind-bogglingly phenomenal on our Discord mothership:

https://discord.gg/KmH48CT

title: MY YEARS WITHOUT YOU
description:
"What's happening?, why are they taking you away? Say something already!! Please say something" I broke down in hot tears as I dragged him trying to set him free from their grip.

  "I'm sorry babe" he mouthed as tears dropped from his eyes.
 I watched them take him away and he didn't look back, not even at me.

Was that it, just a sorry? No explanation?.

I lay there in my confused state and let the tears loose. At that moment, I felt my world fall and shatter.

*********


Amara had waited almost all her life to find happiness, one in form of love. Desperate as ever, she tried all possible ways to gain attention from males but each time, they seemed to be drifting farther.

Just when she had given up, Nathan Amah comes into the picture.

 Handsome as ever and bearing all features she's dreamt of in a man.

 Giving more attention and love than she had ever hoped to get. 

  Amara as she is often called,wouldn't hesitate to jump on an opportunity of love set in front of her.

But as they say,good things don't last long. How long would her love ride last before things begin to turn sour?

Find out in this heart felt story which is promising to 
be exciting!!!!
     

****
 This book is a work of fiction. All names and characters used are from the writer's imagination. Any resemblance to another is a mere act of coincidence.
Thank you.

The cover picture is from Pinterest.com

Yours sincerely,
Eviee Genny.

title: 𝗺𝘆 𝗳𝗶𝗿𝘀𝘁 𝗹𝗼𝘃𝗲
description:
"I don't understand. I'm... Speechless." Lena said as her fingers touched Adrianne's diary. 

"Do you really like me? Or is this a prank?" Lena asked quietly. 

Adrianne looked ar her, "This isn't a prank. This... This is real."

Lena closed her eyes for a few seconds and spoke, "Adrianne, I don't know what to say..." 

Lena Ash is lesbian and the whole school knows. Lena has a crush on her ex-best friend Adrianne.
Adrianne Lerry is the most popular girl in school. She knows that her coming out may ruin her social status. Plus, Adrianne has feelings toward her ex best friend Lena.
What happens when coincidences turn into drama?

title: Entangled| Humor-Romance (Completed)
description:
First love is hard enough.
It's new and exciting and absolutely terrifying and maybe even unrequited. 

When it's difficult for Skyler to move on from her silly little crush, she just has to take a leap of faith... at least that's what she was advised. 

All that's easy to say, but how hard is it to actually confess your feelings, spell it out and put your heart on the line? 

Meet Skyler and experience this struggle with her. 
                     ***************

"What's the worst a confession could lead to?" Skylar thought when she decided to approach her long time crush, everything that followed was absolutely unexpected and totally hilarious... 

Only, maybe it's not so funny for Skyler. 

Ayden Smith is a lone wolf, or so she thought. He didn't exactly go out of his way to make friends and was a little too self-sufficient for his own good. 

Is it even possible he might return her feelings, seems unlikely... but when their paths intertwine, and things get out of hand, what could happen over the course of a summer...?

Other than a tonne of embarrassing things that is...
                     ****************

If you are in the mood for a sweet heartwarming summer romance with not too much drama, this is the one for you. 

Note: This story could lead to a lot of second-hand embarrassment, uncontrollable smiling and loud obnoxious laughter. Proceed with caution⚠
                       ***************
Thank you blackwidow999 for the book cover.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Hey! I'm Vinee.
I read books from many genres but I usually write romance with sarcastic, witty humour, across various sub-genres because I'm a hopeless (sometimes hopeful) romantic.
Check out my books if that is something you want to indulge in.

1. Employed Epoch Of Alex Brook: Book one. (Completed) (2020) ✔
2. Twice In A Lifetime: Book two. (Completed) (2021) ✔
3. Entangled. (Completed) (2020) ✔
4. Dear Intruder (Completed) (2021) ✔ (I'm most excited to share this one with you guys)

Don't forget to leave a vote if you enjoyed it/them, and follow me if you would like to get notified every time I update or share some interesting news. Go ahead and read another one of my book that you haven't yet, that'd be much appreciated.

I try my best to edit and fix any mistakes I can find in my stories, but despite my best efforts some errors can slip past my eyes and the spell check, so... a little heads up, the stories might contain mistakes and if you find them you can notify me by mentioning them in the line comments, just don't be rude, please.

My characters are like real people, they are flawed, they are immature at times and unreasonable too, but I will not tolerate hate in the comment section towards the characters, authors or other readers. Constructive criticism is welcome, but leaving hurtful comments is not acceptable.

If you want to make book covers for me... I would be really grateful and excited and overwhelmed, so don't hesitate, you can send it on my email: vineewriter@gmail.com I'll try to use them as much as I can.

I started an Instagram Page, you can follow me https://www.instagram.com/ineffable_idiosyncrasies

Thank you so much for visiting my page. If you want to chat or need any help, or writing advice, just dm me!
Have a nice day or night or whatever time it is at your place.
Saranghaeyo!

title: COLLISION AT FIRST SPILL
description:
Samantha Harper,a chemistry freshman with a boundless energy, never expected her first day of college to go like this. A small misstep and a cup of coffee later, she finds herself in a messy disaster, dousing the stoic and aloof Alex Reid, a physics student, who couldn't be more different from her. What starts as a chaotic encounter soon unravels into an unexpected connection between two very different worlds.

As Sam's attempts to apologize grow more creative and a little more chaotic she finds herself drawn to the one person who seems immune to her charm.Will her relentless persistence break through Alex's icy exterior,or will Sam learn that not all equations can be solved?

title: Season for No Mistakes
description:
[A Sequel to Drunken Mistake | Jiang Cheng's Story]

Jiang Cheng likes Wen Qing. Jiang Cheng liked Wen Qing since high school. But Wen Qing hated the Jiangs for how they treated Wei Wuxian and the resentment lingered. Then Wen Qing started dating and turned into a slut. Then she came out as bisexual and had a relationship with Jiang Yanli before she settled for Jin Zixuan on their family's insistence. Then Wen Qing had relations with other men and women as Jiang Cheng stood on the sidelines, watching. Finally she met Xue Yang, a man mysterious and charismatic enough to break Wen Qing's heart. What was worse was that now Xue Yang and Wei Wuxian were a team- a father son team since Xue Yang turned out to be the adopted son of Lan Wangji, Wei Wuxian's long time crush and current husband. Now Wen Qing was visiting Wei Wuxian for Christmas. Everyone was. But that also meant she was visiting Xue Yang for Christmas and Jiang Cheng had to make sure that she wouldn't get her heart broken all over again. But what about his own heart?
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
I'm Bai Hao Xue, Indian. I'm a writer. My hobby is learning new things. That's why my name is HaoXue (One with wide learning). Recently I'm learning Chinese.     

Writer, dreamer, and fanfiction enthusiast. I spend my days crafting stories in the world of Mo Dao Zu Shi and other captivating universes.   A lover of slow-burn character arcs, grey undertones, deep emotional dives, and intricate plot twists.  My original works include science fiction, murder mysteries and romance.   Available at @lantianshengyu

My ships include:   Bamon [TVD books(not TV series)] Wangxian[Mo Dao Zu Shi]  Wangxian[Untamed]    (I am not a YiZhan shipper because I believe in the privacy and personal choices of celebrities. But I like both Wang Yibo and Xiao Zhan, individually and together).

title: 𝐒𝐓𝐎𝐋𝐄𝐍 𝐆𝐋𝐀𝐍𝐂𝐄𝐒
description:
"𝐓𝐡𝐞 𝐬𝐭𝐨𝐥𝐞𝐧 𝐠𝐥𝐚𝐧𝐜𝐞 𝐢𝐬 𝐭𝐡𝐞 𝐨𝐥𝐝𝐞𝐬𝐭 𝐭𝐫𝐢𝐜𝐤 𝐰𝐞 𝐤𝐧𝐨𝐰, 𝐲𝐞𝐭 𝐭𝐡𝐞 𝐦𝐨𝐬𝐭 𝐨𝐛𝐯𝐢𝐨𝐮𝐬 𝐬𝐢𝐠𝐧 𝐨𝐟 𝐡𝐢𝐝𝐝𝐞𝐧 𝐚𝐝𝐦𝐢𝐫𝐚𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧."

                                     ♡︎ ☾︎ ♡︎ ☽︎ ♡︎ ☾︎ ♡︎ ☽︎ ♡︎


Xael Wright is a confident girl who is curious for her own good. She is the girl who oozes confidence in everything she does. A fitness lover who runs everyday and goes to the gym but still eats junk food. She loves to try out every drink in the campus coffee shop. 

Orion Warner is a guy who doesn't like to be social. With his anxiety, you can find close to only a few people. A booklover who reads almost every genre, you will not believe the other side of him. Orion is also a guy who likes to be fit by running and going to the gym. 

Xael and Orion use the same path when they run in the morning and the same gym when they workout. They are not strangers nor acquaintances.

When one day, one of them initiates a conversation, what will happen? Will something change about them?

This is Xael and Orion's story

☘︎ Dual point of view
Tous Droits Réservés

description:

Jaemin just thought of the best birthday gift he could give to his cousin, Park Jisung. It has something to do with a baby (literally)... And probably another baby (romantically).

𝐢𝐦𝐩𝐨𝐫𝐭𝐚𝐧𝐭 𝐧𝐨𝐭𝐞𝐬:
📍the people that are mentioned in my book do not depict on what they are in real life. they only portray mostly on what my characters look like, but the mannerisms and personalities do not associate with how they actually are.
📍learn how to separate fiction from reality. the scenarios happening in the book should only stay inside our imaginations. don't let anything inside our world go out. what's in chogiverse stays in chogiverse.
📍any occurrence that will be mentioned inside the book and is happening in real life is purely coincidental.
📍the characters in my book, aside from my original characters, are not owned by me. as it was mentioned; the people that are used to portray a specific character should only portray what they look like. mannerisms and personalities should be locked up inside the book.
📍this is self-indulgent. this book is made based on my own imagination. as a self-proclaimed author, sharing my creativity and delusions inside my head is what makes me happy.
📍please be a responsible reader. read the warnings that will be mentioned before the chapter starts.

𝐂𝐎𝐌𝐏𝐋𝐄𝐓𝐄𝐃 © 𝟐𝟎𝟐𝟎
𝐑𝐄𝐕𝐈𝐒𝐄𝐃: 𝐒𝐄𝐏𝐓𝐄𝐌𝐁𝐄𝐑 𝟐𝟎𝟐𝟒

authorBio:
‼️

I would like to start this off with a disappointing news, I am not back to write new books or to continue writing my on-going books. I came back here as I have decided to revise my old books. This is something I have thought of way back since I was still active here. However, before, I was too busy wanting to write new books that I didn't have time to insert the plan of revising my old books. Even when I took a LONG break, I only had the thought of wanting to revise my old books so bad, but I didn't have time because I was trying to catch up and adjust in college. Though, I'm still going through a lot in college, but the conscience in me has been bugging me to go back and settle my unresolved business. Continuing my on-going book is also an unsettled business, but I personally made a choice to prioritize my old books more.

Regarding the order of books I will make revisions, it's in random order. I will just pick what I feel I want to revise first and next. But rest assured, I will definitely try my very best to rewrite and revise everything. If then, I get my spark back, I'll continue my on-going books.

For now, let's go down to the memory lane together 💗

title: Christmas of Love
description:
Ann Moss thought she was fine with spending Christmas break completely alone, stuck at College. She knew it would be the loneliest break she'd ever had, but was going to make the most of it. She had a plan. She was going to spend her time catching up on her reading. Something she hadn't had time for since starting her Freshman year at College back in August.

It was a good plan, but when she runs into the very attractive Colin Carter, a guy from her Art History class, at the College bookstore, four days before Christmas. Ann suddenly realizes how lame her plan is. And when Colin, a guy she hardly knows, suggest that she should come home with him for Christmas break, she doesn't know what to think. Who in their right mind would want to spend their whole Christmas break with complete strangers? But, somehow she finds herself agreeing to Colin Carter and his dreamy blue eyes. 

Will Ann regret agreeing to go home with Colin for Christmas break?

Find out in Christmas of Love.

title: Contract or Covenant
description:
Nandini is the only granddaughter of a wealthy businessman. Her heart is weak and the doctors have given up on her. She has lost interest in life and is waiting for her life to come to an end.

Manik's friends are his only family. They have a band which performs in small orchestras. They all belong to middle class society. He is boyfriend of Alya who is also a member of the band.

How do Manik and Nandini meet? How long is their relationship meant to last -  a few months or a lifetime?

Ranking :

   #2 in manan on 31st Mar 2022
   #2 in covenant as on 12th Nov 2021
   #418 in short story as on 3rd June 2021
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
My Journey 
                 
When I began I was no writer,
   Appreciation from you, my dear reader
Inspired me to nurture my meager skill,
   And turn writing into a thrill 

Writing for me started as a one-shot,  
  That also meant it would be my last-shot
Words of encouragement made it the first,
  One led to another, and writing became a quest 
   
Mind began to explore,
     Imagination gained wings and began to soar
Ideas sprouting in the mind,
     Along with experiences combined
A rich language and reader's words of praise,
     What more is required for a writer to raise!

In my journey as a writer
       I have managed to come so far
Continued support from you, my dear reader
       raises my hope to shoot for the star

                                               - shining_polestar

authorBio:
Hey everyone!

My name is Scribble and I love writing. I would love to write a lot of books and have lots of people enjoy them too! Not for the fame though, I don't mind if it's just one person who enjoys them. Just wanna spread the happiness or satisfaction of reading a great story.

My goal here is to be able to share my stories with the world and build experience to hopefully become one day an established author.

Some things to know about me:
-I love almost all different genres
-I am a very silly person
-Don't like writing fandom stuff as much. I do love reading it though.

That's all I got to say for now! Have fun reading and stay dreaming!

title: His Girl
description:
❝𝑺𝒉𝒆 𝒘𝒂𝒔 𝒆𝒗𝒆𝒓𝒚𝒕𝒉𝒊𝒏𝒈 𝒉𝒆 𝒘𝒂𝒏𝒕𝒆𝒅.❞



~

Estelle was a sweet girl who lived with her strick parents. She had graduated from school and her only passion was kick boxing but her parents wouldn't allow her to play so her friends surprised her with a kick boxing match. That was the day she saw him.

Killian King. He was the best kick boxing fighter. He had worked really hard to get the name he had now. His parents had sold him and his little brother to the mafia to pay their debts. Killian gained the money by fighting and now was taking care of his brother. He didn't do romance as he couldn't trust no one, not even his own self.

Would Estelle be able to break the walls around his heart? She awakes feeling he didn't even know he would feel in his life and he didn't know if he was scared or not. 

Can Estelle warm Killian's, cold heart?

Read to find out!

~

description:
Charlotte, A 4 year old girl, her mother was killed in front of her by her father and straight after her father shot himself when she was just 2 years old. Charlotte lives in Manhattan, New York. Her mother was a very nice woman but her father was a terrible man that used to hurt her and her mother, she is very small for her age, she looks like a 2 year old even though she is 4, she was neglected so she didn't grow very well. She hasn't learnt a lot of things in her life. She doesn't really talk to people because she thinks they will hit her for talking. The police were called and took Charlotte to an orphanage and one day she was adopted by someone who would make her feel like a princess.

title: The Lost
description:
Scary stories of a place called a city are whispered throughout the tribes of the forest. Rumours of great grey forts with monstrous towers, sprawling walls... a place crawling with the monsters everyone so fears.
 Humans.

---

Despite a slightly concerning size difference, Lyn and Lucius are the best of friends that share one common goal: find Lyn's family. A sudden twist in their lives thrusts the two of them into the sprawl of the human city, and achieving that goal suddenly seems impossible. 
When Lyn and Lucius cross paths with two strange girls, their priorities are tested. These strangers seem to be able to answer Lyn's biggest question: where does she come from? But a pressing problem must be resolved before they can show her.

Who is Aspen, and why are these people so desperate to find him?

---

This is the continuation to my other story called The Winged. It isn't a direct continuation, but I would recommend reading the other story first to avoid confusion. 
If you can suffer through it, you can find it on Search or by looking on my account :)

Apologies for the incredible time it took me to write this crap. Hopefully you enjoy 🥲

title: Archangel| t.r
description:
"Jupiter was supposed to be a star, but failed..."

In 1943, Aurora just wanted to get through her fifth year without being noticed. That was, until, she attracted the attention and inevitable obsession of an older, enigmatic student called Tom. In the aftermath of their graduation from Hogwarts, the tides of life pulled Tom and Aurora in opposite directions amidst the backdrop of a cityscape scarred by war. A chance encounter at a bustling train station many, many years later reignites the dormant flames of their forgotten bond. The familiar glint in each other's eyes, now matured by the passage of time, sparks a distant nostalgia, but for two haunted souls that share an unsettling connection, a bond isn't enough to transcend the darkness that envelops them.  The reunion is tinged with an ominous undercurrent as the remnants of their past resurface, casting long, eerie shadows on their present.

The lines between victim and perpetrator blur, and the distinction between right and wrong becomes a foggy, elusive concept. The once familiar streets of London transform into a nightmarish labyrinth where every step forward unveils a new layer of deception.

Love, no matter how misconstrued it is by the masses, can be taught, and felt in a multitude of different ways; just as Tom Riddle, who would later metamorphosise into a formidable monster, learned to succumb to a dark and dangerous power, he once learned how to love, too - with the unexpected aid of a quiet girl with the name of an angel that could draw things to life.


                                      ⋆ ˚｡⋆୨♡୧⋆ ˚｡⋆

  
                                           a short story.
          [Tom Riddle & Original Female Character]

title: The Mistletoe Game
description:
Every year in the small town of Holly Grove,  twenty-two year old Alexa Esmond and her friends play a game called Mistletoe. The game takes place at the annual Christmas party in the town's square and is rather simple.  If your friend caught you sneaking glances or staring at a cute guy, then they will tell you "Mistletoe!" You would then have to somehow get the guy to kiss you before the party ended, otherwise you would be forced to go on a (horrible) date chosen by the other friend.  Luckily for Alexa, no guy has ever caught her eye, that is, until this year.  And it just so happens to be the guy who broke her heart years ago.

Twenty-five year old Charlie London has always been too busy for women because of his restaurant business in NYC.  What will happen when he spots the girl he let go of all those years ago?  Will old love rekindle into a new flame?  Find out in The Mistletoe Game!

Dangerous. That's the word my office mates used to describe our new boss, Mark Montenegro, the most powerful CEO in the country. 

His attitude and personality intimidated everyone, except me. 

As we interacted, I felt an unusual connection, like something I'd never experienced before. 

Over time, he started attracting me, making me feel close to him. 

Will I also feel the same way about him?

Does he really like me? 

Does he have feelings for me?

Warning: This story contains mature themes, strong language and graphic content. 

For updates on upcoming chapters, please refer to 'Prologue and Explained Chapters.' 

Your support means everything, as this is my first-ever writing endeavor. Thank you and happy reading!
Tous Droits Réservés

title: 2:19 AM ✓
description:
Highest Ranking- #3 in Short Story

(First in teen dialogue series) 

"He-"
   
      

"I am so sorry aunt Claire, I forgot to send a cab to pick you up from airport!" 

   

"Don't worry dear, I reached home safely."

  
   
•~•

    
A dialogue story where a teenage boy misplace a digit of the phone number and instead of his aunt Claire, he calls some random girl and that too at 2:19 AM.

It was just a call, but what he didn't knew was, the receiver was not his aunt, but a girl. The girl was not normal, but a sarcastic one who always had witty comebacks for each and every sentence  and pulls pranks. She was not thirty like his aunt, but only seventeen.

Enjoy the journey of two teenagers who met with fate and that fate was a random call at 2:19 AM.

~

title: The Other Girl (Completed)
description:
Anya was just a normal girl who was always tried to be on everyone's good side. She didn't like dramas and obviously didn't need it in her simple life.
She was happy with her boyfriend of 2 years, a loving family, and a lot of good friends. She was the loveable girl that everyone liked.
So what would she do when everything take a turn. Her once simple life became full of drama. She found out she wasn't the only one, and the truth hurt more than she could imagine.

Can she bare the emotional pain?
Will she be able to love him again after knowing the truth?

authorBio: Stories are my escape from reality

title: FURQAT
description:
In the heart of a city steeped in secrets, Ghasan Lashari returns after a decade, his heart a storm of anger and determination. Obsessed with revenge for his sister's disappearance and the shadowy truth behind it, he is a man torn between darkness and the fragile light of redemption.

Maryam Khan, a woman who embodies strength wrapped in calmness, has spent years seeking solace in faith. Haunted by her own past trauma and the betrayal that marked her childhood, she shields herself behind the unwavering bond she shares with her brother, Shayaan Khan. But beneath her serene exterior lies a storm she barely understands.

Shayaan Khan, a man who has always been Maryam's anchor, knows too well the cost of love and loyalty. From the depths of pain, he has built a life of protection for the sister he swore to keep safe. But when Ghasan walks back into their lives, the balance he worked so hard to maintain is threatened.

 Lyla, a force of ruthlessness and cunning, whose presence breathes a spark of unpredictability into this tangled web of love, betrayal, and revenge. She holds the key to a secret that could either destroy them all or set them free.

As Ghasan's dark quest collides with Maryam's quiet strength, truths are laid bare, and loyalties are tested. Will vengeance consume them, or will they find redemption in the ashes of their broken pasts?

"FURQAT" is a tale of love, pain, and sacrifice, where the line between good and evil blurs, and where two souls find that even in the midst of darkness, there is a glimmer of hope.
Tous Droits Réservés

title: Mga Kwento ni Luis Mondejar
description:
Tagalog horror stories, also known as "kwentong katatakutan," are a popular part of Filipino folklore and modern storytelling, often featuring supernatural creatures, spirits, and eerie occurrences rooted in Filipino culture and beliefs. These stories can be chilling, blending the supernatural with everyday life, and are typically told during gatherings or as bedtime tales to invoke fear and excitement.

authorBio: As a storyteller captivated by the interplay of psychological tension and cosmic horror. I'd aim to create an immersive world that reflects not just fear, but also resilience-the push and pull of human determination against ancient, overwhelming forces.

title: Half of Me
description:
While recovering from a torn ACL that has sidelined her from the ring, Taika finds herself thrust back into the spotlight as her music resurfaces, reigniting interest in her early career.

As she navigates this unexpected resurgence, Taika grapples with a secret that could change everything: she's pregnant. With her on-and-off boyfriend, Joshua, unaware of her condition, she faces the challenge of keeping her pregnancy hidden while managing the pressures of renewed fame. Juggling the demands of her musical comeback, her physical recovery, and the emotional turmoil of her relationship, Taika must confront her past and redefine her future. 

As old friendships are rekindled and new challenges arise, Taika learns that the path to authenticity means embracing all aspects of her life-both the joys and the struggles. With the world watching, will she find the strength to reclaim her identity, or will the weight prove too heavy to bear?

title: The Society - Fortnite Shortstory
description:
The island has a new threat, The Society. They are a group of the richest elites in the island. Their goal? Power. They'll stop at nothing to achieve it. Montague, the founder, is reckless and power hungry. Oscar, the boss, is a wealthy, ruthless, hunter. Valeria, the fire, yearns to know everything and is willing to do anything to get that information. Nisha, the noble, is an extraordinary dualist who fights for the wrong cause.

The Underground threaten the Society's existence and work from the shadow's to stop them, will they succeed?

Follow the members of The Society through hardships, secrecy, betrayal, love, and war and see where their story ends... or is it just beginning?


15,000-20,000 words.


These characters belong to Epic Games and in no way do I claim them as my own. This is my own take on them and any way I use of developing their characters and story is all inspiration from the game and my own ideas.

title: 𝐃𝐎𝐏𝐀𝐌𝐈𝐍𝐄
description:
A wife, aware of her husband and his twin's shared fantasy of a foursome, persuaded her best friend to join them, fulfilling the fantasy as a birthday surprise. This spontaneous sexual encounter unexpectedly led to a pregnancy, complicating the family's already tense situation. 

Compounding the family's troubles, two inebriated adult members impulsively decided, after one too many cocktails, to take a spontaneous trip to the neon-lit streets of Las Vegas and get married in an impromptu ceremony. News of this hasty, alcohol-fueled union quickly spread, heightening the existing sense of bewilderment and discord within the family. Relatives were torn between wanting to be supportive and having concerns about the wisdom and longevity of this reckless marriage.

Now the newlywed couple must integrate their impulsive decision into the complex web of familial relationships and obligations, further straining an already delicate situation.

Can these couples survive?

title: Bloodthirsty Demons
description:
There's a girl named Adriana, she was a wonderful girl and a very independent one. A human who never knows about the darksiders of this cruel world. A human who loves fantasy stories and thinks the myth of the story from her great grandmother told her that she never thought it's actually the true story in this world.. Can u imagine that this storybook named 'Bloodthirsty Demons' is true and comes alive?

She always read the book that was given by her grandmother which was passed to the next generation but the book went missing for 12 years. Would she be very surprised and shocked after knowing that there will be 4 princes waiting for her in another dimension?

"Why? Why does it have to be me?? I'm just an ordinary girl with a normal life." Said Adriana..

"Because you are who we are looking for.." said the unknown guy1.

"The girl who we are waiting for in 30000 years from another dimension.. "Said another guy while he was kneeling and kissed the back of Adriana's hand.

title: Romeo & Juelz ✔
description:
"Your name is Romeo? Like the--"

"--Yes, like the William Shakespeare story."

~~~~~~~~

Summer nights in the late 90s, two best friends spending their days together in a rusty neighborhood somewhere in Arizona. Except, it's the summer of 2024 but-- that doesn't matter. Juelz does matter. Juelz always matters. Maybe just a little too much. Romeo and Juelz are only best friends after all.

🏆[First Place Winner 'YA Romance' PrideAwards 2024]🏆
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Hello, dearest reader! The name's Mayo and I write stories. Music is therapy<3 Next to writing, I also love making (and eating) food, reading webtoons, and giving kisses to my cat.

Romeo & Juelz✔; Hot summer days in Arizona☀🌵, eating strawberry popsicles underneath a willow tree and running down the abandoned roads at night. That's how best friends Romeo and Juelz spend their summer break together. But what happens when both boys slowly begin to realize their feelings for each other? 💖If you need a break from all the heartbreak and angst, this story is for you!💖⚡

He Was A Skater Boy (ongoing); There is nothing that the chaotic Robbie Blue hates more than cliches, and he vows to keep it that way. But being the new student at a fancy private school, befriending both the popular kids *and* the outcasts, and developing a crush on the school's self-proclaimed troublemaker, threatens to get in the way of that statement.
A not-so-typical twist on your typical high-school cliche!🌈⚡

Ash and Lily, sisters from a broken home, are burying a beloved pet. Suddenly Void, a psychopathic murder, appears to take their lives. To "finally release their poison onto the world with no strings attached". Running out of time they hide in an abandoned Catholic church. Will they find out why Void is after them before they die?

-Ku ishe, pashe nje enderr shume te keqe.

Thashe teksa ai dol nga banjoja dhe erdh afer meje.
-Çfare endrre?
-Sikur ti po me tradhetoje.
-Oh e dashur une nuk do e beja kurre, a e kemi sqaruar kete gje.

-Fli tani dhe mjaft mendove gjera te tilla.

title: The Nerd's Obsession
description:
THE NERD'S OBSESSION
She was a simple girl, as thought by everyone, until he finds her dancing at a stripper club.
He was a nerd, until she finds him in her stripper club, bidding the highest.

"I didn't know you were this, Lara."
"What do you mean!" She asked as I ruined her dress.
My fingers entered her and she gasped with a movement. "Your eyes hold desire, Lara, since..."
"The day I saw you in our class," She completed squeezing my shoulders.

Peep in to know more. It is a One Shot.

title: I Dare You
description:
At Anderson High, Kane Evans is a "god" - he has it all. He has every girl dropping dead to their knees. 
  Kane isn't afraid of anything, after all, he is the captain of the football team and has that bad boy reputation stuck to him. 
    
  His best friend Jax wins the bet and dares Kane something he never saw coming. 
  Mia Brown - was his dare. She wasn't just any typical school girl she was the misfit/nerd of the school. 
  She wears boy clothes and carries her guitar with her where ever she goes. 
    
  If Kane can get Mia to date him for up to at least 1 month, Jax will set up his hot sister Ava on a date with Kane at Prom.  
  Kane thinks Ava is really hot and wants to ask her out to Prom, the only way he can do this is buy sealing the deal with Jax. 
    
  Will Mia fall for Kane like all the other girls or will Kane win the dare and date Ava like he wished?

title: New Year, Same Us - Auston Matthews
description:
You and Auston had been friends since you were in kindergarten. You were close. Maybe too close from the outside looking in. But that was just you and Auston, never separating, never leaving from the others side. 

How many times did you have to tell people, "No, we're not a couple." And how many times did your heart burn wishing that you were. You were in love with him, at the very least, and you thought you did a good job at masking it from him. But apparently everyone else saw right through it.

title: Set Me Up
description:
He's the Olympic gold medalist in my major that I'd never have a chance with, and our paths finally cross when I try to set him up with my shy best friend.

DAZE

After being bullied by the cutest boy in high school, I have a very strict policy in college of avoiding cute guys. Pretty hard when Jake freaking Bing, Olympic volleyball gold medalist, exists in the same timeline as me. Or to be more precise, in my engineering major.
It doesn't help that my best friend has a giant flaming torch for him. But she's too shy to do anything except pining from afar. I'm the only one who can help her, even if it means approaching the unapproachable Jake.

JAKE

People around me got really weird after I won a gold medal at last year's Olympics, especially girls who seem to see me as their ticket to fame or money. I decide to swear off them for what's left of my college career and focus on school and volleyball. 
But then Daisy, AKA Daze, Rojas decides to give me the time of the day for the first time in almost four years, and I just so happen to have always had a weakness for her. Too bad she seems to be trying to set me up with her friend...

Who is going to be the ultimate winner of this game?

Set Me Up is a standalone, dual POV, closed door romance novella with mild language, and heat without spice. 

Tropes:
	•	Volleyball college romance.
	•	Who hurt you?
	•	Given up on love.
	•	He's an Olympic athlete.
	•	She's a nerdy Latina.
	•	Slow burn.
	•	He falls first and harder.
	•	No 3rd act breakup.
	•	Closed door romance.

title: Two Simps Get Married
description:
Two Simps Get Married
by 云姝云晓

Associated Names: 两个舔狗结连理
Completion Status: Completed
Original Language: Chinese
Diversity:  Non-BL
Endings: Happy Ending
Genres: Romance
Settings: Ancient Chinese
Tags: Lighthearted, Secret Crush, Sweet


Description:

My childhood friend, Gu Si Yuan, married the most talented woman in the capital, Lin Xi.

At their wedding banquet, Young Marquis Lu and I-both heartbroken-drowned our sorrows in drink.

Because, I had feelings for Gu Si Yuan, and he admired Lin Xi.

We drank until we were completely wasted, and in front of everyone, I clung to him, sobbing heart-wrenchingly.

And just like that, our families forced us into marriage.

On our wedding night, I noticed a portrait of Lin Xi hanging on the wall of the bridal chamber.

In the spirit of fairness, I pulled out a portrait of Gu Si Yuan from my sleeve and hung it beside hers.

At that moment, Young Marquis Lu entered the room and suddenly remarked,

"Looking at them like this, they really do seem like a perfect match!"



Disclaimer: This Story is not mine nor I have created it. Copyright belongs solely to the real author of this book. This is only for offline purposes and did not meant to offend anyone !!!!

title: The Four Year Plan (Completed)
description:
"Will you get off of me. This isn't apart of the deal Landon. You don't get to fuck me." 

"I know I know. But let's just imagine." I stood up with a dress in my hand trying to leave his embrace. But he kept my hips on his pelvis. "It's dark, we're on my bed. Your small frame under me-"

"Landon." He ignored me. 

"As I pound viscously into you." I couldn't help but to imagine to. A wave of heat flashed over me and he chuckled. "You're thinking of it too now, aren't you?" He asked breathing into my neck. With that I pushed myself off of him. 

"Asshole." I muttered slipping on the sundress.

title: You And Me + Baby - TaeGi
description:
SHORT STORY


"Um, excuse me, sir! Do you need help?"

When Yoongi looks up, the air is knocked out of his body. There, standing right in front of him, is the most beautiful man he's ever seen. He can't help but feel a little self conscious, especially when he looks like a train wreck, but his feeling of hopelessness out weighs that, and he finds himself nodding.

The stranger gives him a huge smile when he takes Jeongguk, and Yoongi feels butterflies. He watches as the man quiet downs his son's crying and laughs at the silly faces he pulls.

As Yoongi stares in pure amazement, he can't help but think how this is what he had dreamed of.

Or

Yoongi is a single father, and Taehyung just wants to help.
